name: MJ Hegar
subject: enough with the corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
By defeating Senator Cornyn, Texans can send a message that it's time for a government that works for all of us, not just special interests.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6f6/3540701801/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

**This is going to be a historic election.** Texas is the nation's largest battleground state, and by defeating a nearly 20-year incumbent who's propped up by special interest cash, we can send a strong message that Texans have _had it_ with the corruption in Washington.

**Thanks to this grassroots team, we 're building a movement to WIN** \-- _Roll Call_ even ranked **Sen. Cornyn one of the top ten most vulnerable senators.** But Senator Cornyn's deep pockets will make sustaining our momentum a challenge: He has a nearly _$11 million war chest._

**In order to stay on track to compete with Senator Cornyn 's money, my finance team tells me we need to raise another $7,168 by the end of this week. [And since I'm not taking money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on you to help us get there.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6f5/3540701801/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6f4/3540701801/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6eb/3540701801/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6ea/3540701801/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6e9/3540701801/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6e8/3540701801/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__")**
Listen, I've never been afraid to fight for what's right. >From flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on the government to open ground combat jobs to women. That's why I decided to challenge Senator Cornyn -- because he hasn't done right by Texans.

I intend to run this race the right way, too. That means funding my campaign with grassroots donations from hard-working folks like you who just wish their government would look out for their families for a change -- the same people I will fight for in the Senate.

**But Senator Cornyn 's cash is nothing to sneeze at, and we need to hit our mid-month goal if we're going to beat him and his special interest supporters. [So Peter, please pitch in whatever you can to help us reach our $7,168 goal this week!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6f5/3540701801/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,
MJ
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a2/7f51f7bc/4a7155f3/4ef0d6f5/3540701801/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191217.2nd__645__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Gary Peters
subject: Trump is on his way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Trump knows if Democrats lose here, we have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaf3/5721a3ed/71b0431e/efab799/133571026/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend: Donald Trump will hold a campaign rally in Michigan tomorrow.
**Trump knows****if Democrats lose here, we have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate.**

That's why I'm asking for your help. Because if we lose here, Democrats will have two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington.

That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.
Analysts at CBS News report Senate control is riding on what happens here in Michigan, but right now, polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent, and just last week, a dark money group launched ads attacking me.

**That's why we've set a goal to raise another $25,000 before Trump takes the stage tomorrow. Senate control is at stake, and every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing.**

**Please, friend, I'm counting on your immediate support:** **[Will you make a contribution of $3 right now- every dollar you can before midnight - to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk154-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Yesterday we filed an emergency motion to stop the voter purge.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Help us pack the courtroom and show that Georgians believe voters should not be purged for simply not voting. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa58c/34a064cc/1b6dd06e/7035d69/3969593374/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Yesterday, Fair Fight Action filed an emergency motion seeking to prevent the State of Georgia from conducting an imminent massive, planned and illegal purge of 300,000 Georgia voters from the rolls. During the hearing, the Secretary of State's office said they lacked the technical capacity to stop the purge that was underway, but that they will reinstate voters if ordered to do so. We'll be back in court on Thursday, when the judge will further consider the "use it or lose it" voter purges, which threaten to remove 120,000 Georgians from the rolls and take away their right to vote simply because they did not express that right in recent elections. So we need your help: [**This Thursday - let 's pack the courtroom to show that Georgians believe voters should not be purged for simply not voting. RSVP here to join us.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa58c/34a064cc/1b6dd06e/7035d76/3969593374/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjE3MTlFUE0tMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/events/1477591529081474?source=IE121719EPM-1-b") Under our constitution, no voter - in Georgia or any part of our nation - should lose their right to vote simply because they have not expressed that right in recent elections. It's up to us to show it. Yours in the fight, \- Team Fair Fight Action **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa58c/34a064cc/1b6dd06e/7035d77/3969593374/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjE3MTlFUE0tMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE121719EPM-1-b")**
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: The momentum is real.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| We're not stopping now. Team, The last two weeks have been huge for this campaign. We're seeing a rising level of grassroots enthusiasm for Cory both in the early states and around the country -- and I'm excited to report that this has been reflected in our online fundraising. I wanted to share some numbers with you so you can see for yourself how this team is growing stronger each and every day. **[And then I'm going to ask you to donate to help us hit our $800,000 end-of-year goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191217_BHQ_20191217-fr-BHQ-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
* Since the start of December, we've raised almost **5x more daily** on average than we raised during an average day in November.

* We raised **7x more online** in the first ten days of December than we did during the same period in November.

* We've seen growth in our donor base -- in the first ten days of December, we acquired 24,284 new donors, which is **9x more** than we acquired during the same period in November.

* On average, we've acquired **6x more** new donors daily in December than we got during an average day in November.

Thanks to our grassroots donors, we're going up on the air in Iowa with $500,000 worth of brand new ads. **This is what momentum looks like!** **Help us keep it up.[If you can, chip in $5 right now so we can continue our strong fundraising momentum and blow past our $800,000 goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191217_BHQ_20191217-fr-BHQ-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's keep it going,
Jenna Jenna Lowenstein
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191217_BHQ_20191217-fr-BHQ-EM2-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cff/5fca0d19/7872bd6d/291c921a/1816145089/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cff/5fca0d19/7872bd6d/291c9219/1816145089/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cff/5fca0d19/7872bd6d/291c9218/1816145089/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cff/5fca0d19/7872bd6d/291c9267/1816145089/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cff/5fca0d19/7872bd6d/291c9266/1816145089/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cff/5fca0d19/7872bd6d/291c921a/1816145089/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Bennet HQ
subject: did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | | [Did you see Michael's message from this morning, team? He announced that if we can't raise $700,000 in the next 30 days we won't be able to compete in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978281/1839499175/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Polls show that up to 76% of Democratic voters haven't decided on a candidate, and we need to make sure Michael is at the forefront when they do.

[So please, team, take a moment to read Michael's message and make your first donation of $5 or whatever you can afford!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978280/1839499175/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978287/1839499175/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friend,

[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") I know you get fundraising asks from us all the time, but this is different.

When I spoke to my family about running for president, my daughter Caroline told me:

_" Dad, if you run and tell the truth, no one can fault you for it."_

So I'm going to tell you the honest truth:

[We need to raise $700,000 in 30 days or our campaign will not have the resources to compete in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978285/1839499175/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race.

So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy. But without funds for TV and digital advertising, more field staff, and a direct mail program, [we cannot compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves and building on the ground.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know that our path to victory runs through New Hampshire, where just 33% of Democratic voters say their minds are made up.

As other candidates have left the race or stumbled in the last few weeks, we have doubled down and gained momentum.

My team and I have put together an aggressive plan to reach the nearly 70% of undecided voters there through paid media--including digital advertising, direct mail, and TV--as well as expanding our organizing and outreach programs.

Core to this strategy are our 50 New Hampshire town halls and a new ad series to introduce our campaign to the many voters who are just tuning in to this race.

_But this is going to be expensive, and I can 't rely on a billionaire's bank account._

[The only way we can launch this program and compete in New Hampshire is by raising $700,000 before January 16th.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978284/1839499175/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**This is our final push and our final ask: We need your help to have more than just a fighting chance. Can you chip in $5 to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy to ensure our campaign has the funds we need by January 16?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/6997829b/1839499175/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978284/1839499175/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978285/1839499175/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/6997829a/1839499175/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978299/1839499175/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=2000&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
If you're fully committed to my campaign, _thank you on behalf of the entire team._

[But if you haven't decided on a candidate yet and believe we need a president who's focused on the next generation - not just the next tweet -](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsHAA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") [then please consider stepping up today to help us reach this crucial $700,000 goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsHAw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

At a time when other campaigns have slashed staff, closed offices, and left the race, we have been able to grow and build in New Hampshire. From more endorsements to larger crowds and new office space, the environment is ripe for our success.

[But without a significant uptick in fundraising, we will not have the resources to fully capitalize on the groundwork that has been laid to compete.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsHAg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a candidate who will beat Donald Trump and build opportunity for the next generation.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978284/1839499175/VEsHDQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and fuel our campaign to victory. I know we can do it with your help. Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can afford) right now to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978286/1839499175/VEsHDA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba92f/134673f2/93daeb0/69978285/1839499175/VEsEBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you,

Michael

name: Tina Smith
subject: Re: Yesterday's missed goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This grassroots team has always had my back, so I'm asking you to stand with me and help make up for yesterday's missed goal.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191217-missed2?refcode=em191217-missed2&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") I'll be honest, friend, we missed our goal yesterday.

The truth is, fewer people opened our messages over the past few days because they're shifting gears toward the holidays. And hey, I don't blame them.

But we can't afford to take our foot off the gas this close to our most important FEC deadline of the year. This grassroots team has always had my back, so I'm asking you to stand with me and help make up for this temporary lapse.

name: Nancy Mace for Congress
subject: 🎶 Hey, Hey. Ho, Ho. Impeachment Joe Has GOT To Go! 🎶
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-i/)
| | | Joe Cunningham Officially Voting For Impeachment Dear Friend, I think a lot of us share the same disappointment with our current Representative. Disappointment that he isn’t who he promised he would be. Disappointment that he did not follow through putting Lowcountry first. **I’m talking, of course, about Joe Cunningham, and his announcement that he would hand Nancy Pelosi and National Democrats his voting card, and vote YES for impeachment.** _I wanted to believe Joe, to believe that he wouldn’t be partisan or beholden to national Democrats —**I think a lot of us did**._ _Unfortunately, that just hasn’t been the case._ And this isn’t the only time. The Lowcountry deserves better. **I Want To Give Them A Choice, And I Hope You’ll Continue To Help Me In That Effort.**
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-d/)
_You see, I believe I better represent the fiscally conservative values of the Lowcountry. But I also won’t put my party ahead of my constituents or what I believe in — and I’ve shown that in my time in the SC legislature. My first bill was a bipartisan criminal justice bill, and I’ve crossed my own party to vote against their wasteful spending._ **The Lowcountry deserves nothing less. We’re not getting it right now, and that’s why our representatives must answer to their constituents.** **I'm running to offer the common sense, fiscally conservative representation that our First District used to have.** _I’ll stand up for our shared beliefs, and I’ll stand up for the Lowcountry, every single day._ I won’t be beholden to _**ANY**_ party. Count on it. [_**SUPPORT NANCY. DONATE TODAY >>>
SUPPORT NANCY. DONATE TODAY >>>
SUPPORT NANCY. DONATE TODAY >>>**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-h/) Sincerely, Nancy Mace
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-k/)
**[Website](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-u/) | [Facebook](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-o/) | [Twitter](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-b/) **| _[**Donate**](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jduuitg-uuffjdtr-n/)_
**PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**

name: Dean Browning
subject: Rep. Wild to Vote on Trump Impeachment
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Our lame-duck congresswoman, Susan Wild, and her friends in the Democratic Caucus are preparing for a House vote to impeach President Donald J. Trump as early as this afternoon.
While I am sure you have figured this out on your own, this impeachment is a baseless witch hunt designed by the Democratic Party to do nothing more than raise money and attempt to smear President Trump's reelection in 2020.
All Republicans need to come together now to fight for the President we elected. We must let the Democrats know that we will not stand for this!
So I'm asking you, please, will you help me stop this madness?
[Donate $50, $25, or even just $10, to help me fight against the Liberal Elites and their phony impeachment!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RnNlnwcblBxhrU9cn2ve4zdTZQSFB-rt_3NKOnZnZ1NiGwark19w4suedsJLiZ74ge9-nYTP5dkl8OFfoLppFIzCI5g5QyQdFd4gCOZfAmUi6UUk3E08To0YE4DUo8k5yCmpU_rlDn5yvBJEan7nd2ZiH0OlR3-iLxKXHZ-Mo4DkEtu_4zmRsg==&c=1bp0jYs7w_OQZYkBnlKN8mItQdaLNTnImUxWF925IuW98mSv4RhOxw==&ch=kd8Q6TSPIFMAKzUoehFVfd2vzkoxDGFxX5UdtJku2Ff2JUHjbC9Leg==)

| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RnNlnwcblBxhrU9cn2ve4zdTZQSFB-rt_3NKOnZnZ1NiGwark19w4suedsJLiZ74ge9-nYTP5dkl8OFfoLppFIzCI5g5QyQdFd4gCOZfAmUi6UUk3E08To0YE4DUo8k5yCmpU_rlDn5yvBJEan7nd2ZiH0OlR3-iLxKXHZ-Mo4DkEtu_4zmRsg==&c=1bp0jYs7w_OQZYkBnlKN8mItQdaLNTnImUxWF925IuW98mSv4RhOxw==&ch=kd8Q6TSPIFMAKzUoehFVfd2vzkoxDGFxX5UdtJku2Ff2JUHjbC9Leg==)
---
| The only way we can fight back against the Democratic Party is by voting them out of office and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE.
Our elected officials need to be held accountable for their actions and their votes. I intend to do my part by earning your vote and support to remove Rep. Susan Wild from office in November 2020.
, I can't do this on my own and now more than ever I need your support.
A contribution to my campaign will go a long way in exposing Rep. Susan Wild's affiliation with the impeachment against President Trump. [Will you donate $50, $25, or even just $10 today to remove Rep. Wild from office?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RnNlnwcblBxhrU9cn2ve4zdTZQSFB-rt_3NKOnZnZ1NiGwark19w4suedsJLiZ74ge9-nYTP5dkl8OFfoLppFIzCI5g5QyQdFd4gCOZfAmUi6UUk3E08To0YE4DUo8k5yCmpU_rlDn5yvBJEan7nd2ZiH0OlR3-iLxKXHZ-Mo4DkEtu_4zmRsg==&c=1bp0jYs7w_OQZYkBnlKN8mItQdaLNTnImUxWF925IuW98mSv4RhOxw==&ch=kd8Q6TSPIFMAKzUoehFVfd2vzkoxDGFxX5UdtJku2Ff2JUHjbC9Leg==)

| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RnNlnwcblBxhrU9cn2ve4zdTZQSFB-rt_3NKOnZnZ1NiGwark19w4suedsJLiZ74ge9-nYTP5dkl8OFfoLppFIzCI5g5QyQdFd4gCOZfAmUi6UUk3E08To0YE4DUo8k5yCmpU_rlDn5yvBJEan7nd2ZiH0OlR3-iLxKXHZ-Mo4DkEtu_4zmRsg==&c=1bp0jYs7w_OQZYkBnlKN8mItQdaLNTnImUxWF925IuW98mSv4RhOxw==&ch=kd8Q6TSPIFMAKzUoehFVfd2vzkoxDGFxX5UdtJku2Ff2JUHjbC9Leg==)
---
| The Democrats will do anything they can to impeach the President in a pathetic attempt to win the election in 2020. We must not let this happen.
I will continue to fight for our President, Democracy, and Conservative values that continue to make this country so great. #MAGA

| For Freedom,

|

| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: My vote on impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-yZ5lA6TJkx6VPNHLiZKME4EmcBoIFYjl0FM2vlVpe4=/v7BBU1c2wjYW7u_S3lF8m7DoUZLvsRFXhRvtRPca5v0=)
---
Folks, **In just a few hours, I will be voting to impeach President Donald Trump for abuse of power and obstruction of Congress.** What has become abundantly clear throughout the course of these proceedings is that the President abused his power when he used his position to illicit "dirt" on a political opponent, invited a foreign nation to exert influence over American elections, and then attempted to cover up his wrongdoings. **Faced with overwhelming evidence of corruption stemming from the commander in chief, our obligation is clear: We must hold the President accountable, because no one should be above the law. I am not above the law, you are not above the law, and neither is the President.** After impeachment passes the House, it will move to the Senate, who will decide whether to convict and remove the President from office. I hope my colleagues in the Senate will treat these charges with the gravity they deserve, and do right by both the American people and the Constitution they swore to defend. **Today and every day, I will continue to defend you and the country that I love.** Thank you for your continued support and commitment to justice. In solidarity, Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-yZ5lA6TJkx6VPNHLiZKME4EmcBoIFYjl0FM2vlVpe4=/tZ5MJRu03sknH8IrlYzLnJyd-vFPtKvasK9nBzQcqj0=?refcode=1218-impeachvote&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

name: Susan Collins
subject: My Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEzNjMyMjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTY3MzQ3MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEzNjMyMjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTY3MzQ3MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_

Growing up in Aroostook County, I learned to work hard and to serve others. My parents set the tone, with their commitment to our 5th generation family business and with their devotion to public service.

My father served in the State Senate, as did his father and grandfather before him, and my mother was Mayor of Caribou and Chairman of the University of Maine System Board of Trustees. Their commitment to public service helped inspire me to run for the United States Senate.

As Maine's Senator, I have had a number of important legislative successes that have benefited our state and the nation. One of my first major legislative accomplishments was when I teamed up with Senator Dick Durbin to repeal a $50 billion tax break for big tobacco companies. In the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks, I worked with Senator Joe Lieberman to make our country safer by enacting the most sweeping changes to our intelligence agencies since World War II. As Chairman of the Senate Aging Committee, I have authored laws to lower the cost of prescription drugs and to better protect and improve the lives of older Americans. And, since joining the Senate Appropriations Committee ten years ago, I have helped secure more than $560 million to improve Maine's roads, bridges, airports, and seaports.

Just this week, Senator Doug Jones and I secured a victory for military families by repealing what's commonly referred to as the "widow's tax," an unfair offset that reduces benefits for surviving military spouses whose loved ones were killed serving our country or who died of service-connected illnesses. Another important effort I've led with Senator Tina Smith addresses the alarming public health threat caused by Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses - and is on the verge of becoming law.

One reason why I have been able to pass so many laws is because of the bipartisan, commonsense approach I learned growing up in Maine. For the past six years, I have been ranked the most bipartisan member of the Senate.

Another reason I have been effective is because of the Maine work ethic that I learned as a child. In Maine, we show up for work every day. I have never missed a roll call vote - yesterday I cast my 7,234th consecutive vote.

I promised the people of Maine a decision this fall on whether I would seek reelection. The fundamental question I had to ask myself in making my decision was this: in today's polarized political environment, is there still a role for a centrist who believes in getting things done through compromise, collegiality, and bipartisanship?

I have concluded that the answer to this question is "yes," and I will, therefore, seek the honor of continuing to serve as Maine's United States Senator.

To say that these are difficult and contentious times is most certainly an understatement. But our country has confronted much more challenging times in our history. Seventy-five years ago this week, U.S. forces were engaged in one of the most consequential battles of World War II, the Battle of the Bulge. American soldiers - including my father - courageously fought back, ensuring victory for the Allies.

That generation found ways to solve the challenges of their era, and I believe that we can as well. My commitment to you remains strong, and I am as determined as ever to keep bringing people together, to speak out for the values that unite our great country, and to deliver results for Maine and America.

_****_
[DONATE](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEzNjMyMjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTY3MzQ3MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Impeachment vote & VITAL new effort
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
** Today we’re launching the IMPEACHMENT DEFENSE FUND, to show President Trump that Minnesota conservatives have his back! >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/a3190eff2dbc7407/0467aeb073c3a761c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative,

name: Susan Collins
subject: My Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEzNjMyMzcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTY3MzgzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEzNjMyMzcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTY3MzgzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_

Growing up in Aroostook County, I learned to work hard and to serve others. My parents set the tone, with their commitment to our 5th generation family business and with their devotion to public service.

My father served in the State Senate, as did his father and grandfather before him, and my mother was Mayor of Caribou and Chairman of the University of Maine System Board of Trustees. Their commitment to public service helped inspire me to run for the United States Senate.

As Maine's Senator, I have had a number of important legislative successes that have benefited our state and the nation. One of my first major legislative accomplishments was when I teamed up with Senator Dick Durbin to repeal a $50 billion tax break for big tobacco companies. In the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks, I worked with Senator Joe Lieberman to make our country safer by enacting the most sweeping changes to our intelligence agencies since World War II. As Chairman of the Senate Aging Committee, I have authored laws to lower the cost of prescription drugs and to better protect and improve the lives of older Americans. And, since joining the Senate Appropriations Committee ten years ago, I have helped secure more than $560 million to improve Maine's roads, bridges, airports, and seaports.

Just this week, Senator Doug Jones and I secured a victory for military families by repealing what's commonly referred to as the "widow's tax," an unfair offset that reduces benefits for surviving military spouses whose loved ones were killed serving our country or who died of service-connected illnesses. Another important effort I've led with Senator Tina Smith addresses the alarming public health threat caused by Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses - and is on the verge of becoming law.

One reason why I have been able to pass so many laws is because of the bipartisan, commonsense approach I learned growing up in Maine. For the past six years, I have been ranked the most bipartisan member of the Senate.

Another reason I have been effective is because of the Maine work ethic that I learned as a child. In Maine, we show up for work every day. I have never missed a roll call vote - yesterday I cast my 7,234th consecutive vote.

I promised the people of Maine a decision this fall on whether I would seek reelection. The fundamental question I had to ask myself in making my decision was this: in today's polarized political environment, is there still a role for a centrist who believes in getting things done through compromise, collegiality, and bipartisanship?

I have concluded that the answer to this question is "yes," and I will, therefore, seek the honor of continuing to serve as Maine's United States Senator.

To say that these are difficult and contentious times is most certainly an understatement. But our country has confronted much more challenging times in our history. Seventy-five years ago this week, U.S. forces were engaged in one of the most consequential battles of World War II, the Battle of the Bulge. American soldiers - including my father - courageously fought back, ensuring victory for the Allies.

That generation found ways to solve the challenges of their era, and I believe that we can as well. My commitment to you remains strong, and I am as determined as ever to keep bringing people together, to speak out for the values that unite our great country, and to deliver results for Maine and America.

_****_
[DONATE](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEzNjMyMzcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTY3MzgzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Claire Chase
subject: ICYMI: U.S. Rep. Picks Pelosi, Schiff Over NM Voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Please take a look at the op/ed in today's Albuquerque Journal I wrote about Xochitl Torres Small's failed leadership for the residents of New Mexico District 2.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019WOSjD21GpCfHZCdpMCA1iNEPVLxxOUhU-8dbGi0TVgtejLAVb4m5SAyeCbag8F3qChwOTDdaGXfCDWj5HmBKmh_k3V76ikOLWs6AixtCMgi5PAW_HWQtcfGGeltX0sP3CmWsOLn9OYxOoMU5EiLvBrK0WyTNkCI7LY4ZOcaUYn967NuZeIMqd9IZkpg2-2u&c=wGNB75cS-7L7Qbe6w5hWjAZkP507p3KAjlvPPT0jAfw8TffL9VjzBg==&ch=l3AKUVhpn9YByJuwDfM2qeDB3li5VhB8vtjJYMAcpzskA9RHhyVa4A==)
---
| On the campaign trail in 2018, Xochitl Torres Small promised voters she would go to Congress and fight for bipartisan solutions to the critical issues facing our District, New Mexico, and our nation. They believed her, but since the moment she stepped foot on Capitol Hill, Torres Small has done everything but keep her promise to her constituents.
Instead of working across the aisle to deliver for our district, Torres Small has spent her time in Congress voting with Nancy Pelosi 93% of the time and joining forces with the "resistance" to derail progress and obstruct results at every turn.
She accepted thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from Adam Schiff, only to return the favor by supporting this baseless, partisan-fueled impeachment inquiry. After announcing her support for impeachment this week, it seems Schiff's quid pro quo also bought Torres Small's vote to impeach President Trump, as well.
By voting for impeachment, Xochitl Torres Small is stabbing her constituents in the back - and simultaneously sealing her fate in 2020.
Voters in the 2nd District elected President Trump in 2016 to drain the swamp in Washington and get the results we had been promised by politicians on both sides of the aisle for generations. He has delivered tremendous results for the American people - and the hardworking men and women of New Mexico have especially benefited.
Nearly 40,000 jobs have been added in New Mexico, our state's unemployment rate has decreased to a record low of 4.8%, and the historic Tax Cuts and Jobs Act has generated an average tax cut of nearly $1,400 per family.
With absolutely no help from Xochitl Torres Small or other Democrats, President Trump has helped New Mexico thrive. But our own congresswoman could not care less. Torres Small knows her party cannot beat President Trump or his record of results in 2020, so she is siding with Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff to impeach him instead.
Torres Small's constituents will not let her get away with this. Recent polling in the 2nd District shows 66% of voters want Torres Small to oppose impeachment and do the job she was elected to do - and 56% of voters oppose impeaching President Trump in general. Even still, she is going to vote for impeachment.
She could ignore the polls all she wants, but Torres Small cannot ignore the protests outside her office or at events throughout the district. Voters are not going to be silent while our congresswoman votes to delegitimize the 2016 election results, undermine the votes of over 63 million Americans and destroy the results our president has delivered that have helped New Mexico prosper.
As our congresswoman, Torres Small has done nothing to keep her promise to her constituents. She has actively worked against our best interests to help Nancy Pelosi and radicals in her party obstruct, resist and derail President Trump's agenda to put America first - and voting for impeachment is the last straw.
Republicans cannot afford to blow another shot at winning the 2nd District in 2020. Voters must unify behind a winning nominee who has what it takes to win in November and fight for the results we were promised.
No more games. No more witch hunts. No more losing. By siding with Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff over her constituents, Xochitl Torres Small has sealed her fate in 2020 - and I am running to make sure she never gets away with it.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019WOSjD21GpCfHZCdpMCA1iNEPVLxxOUhU-8dbGi0TVgtejLAVb4m5Xs-Rb2pydpwh9cIYvfYnf5kSud-0ubzFo-2Obpe7z7aiUAi3PzvphSTkLT-DzyshTkPEfqizhFb8G_0F_DQhHSLtbCw5g1N7Ni1ie1NHM-e&c=wGNB75cS-7L7Qbe6w5hWjAZkP507p3KAjlvPPT0jAfw8TffL9VjzBg==&ch=l3AKUVhpn9YByJuwDfM2qeDB3li5VhB8vtjJYMAcpzskA9RHhyVa4A==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019WOSjD21GpCfHZCdpMCA1iNEPVLxxOUhU-8dbGi0TVgtejLAVb4m5Xs-Rb2pydpwM2S-42RJWDkwy-P3LrE3KiVN8KGpfIP1spI1ymI54LvwWn0i9ZeaOdL6JjfqDgfMiJ15TOJus3xZgEMfou2qONdw0krUgPi6&c=wGNB75cS-7L7Qbe6w5hWjAZkP507p3KAjlvPPT0jAfw8TffL9VjzBg==&ch=l3AKUVhpn9YByJuwDfM2qeDB3li5VhB8vtjJYMAcpzskA9RHhyVa4A==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019WOSjD21GpCfHZCdpMCA1iNEPVLxxOUhU-8dbGi0TVgtejLAVb4m5Xs-Rb2pydpwk5vWVHgAt_3xfsNNdcxP-sqWUj8uU6mpDtX8FADt-n_9uHGkEpzDfPIic3YwVzuLbN7oN-GBnfhMThCXdv_Yk_fnu3r58rzlzq4VIOP77os=&c=wGNB75cS-7L7Qbe6w5hWjAZkP507p3KAjlvPPT0jAfw8TffL9VjzBg==&ch=l3AKUVhpn9YByJuwDfM2qeDB3li5VhB8vtjJYMAcpzskA9RHhyVa4A==)

This primary race is now neck-and-neck, and March 3rd will be here before we know it. With Jeff Sessions sitting on a $2.5 MILLION campaign war chest, Coach needs every supporter to step up now! body:

| I hope I can count on you, friend. Hey friend, A few days ago, our campaign launched a goal to raise $800,000 by the end of the month -- the amount we need to raise to surpass last quarter's fundraising numbers. The good news is, we're making great progress to our goal! I had my team break down the numbers, and they told me that if 510 more people from Pennsylvania chip in before the deadline, we will be on track to make it. **Will you be one of the 510 people from Pennsylvania who helps us reach this goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191218_CB_20191218-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

With the Iowa caucuses less than 50 days away, this is a goal we can't miss. And at the end of the month, we'll be closing the books on this year's fundraising. All eyes will be on our campaign to see if we have the momentum to take this all the way to the White House. **Let 's show them we do.**

body:

**Breaking: Final Impeachment of President Trump HOURS away**

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Wanted to make sure you knew about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hi Peter, Now that we're getting close to the end of the year, I wanted to make sure you saw the e-mail my team sent out. You can get a tax credit for donating to a State Senate race! It would be really great to have your support, plus you get something good from it! But this tax credit goes away after 2019, so make sure to get your contribution in before January. Hope you have a happy holiday season! Warmly, Betsy \--------------------------------------------------------------------------- | |
---
Take advantage of your tax credit... before it disappears Ohio had been one of the few states to give taxpayers a tax credit for small donations to state candidates- a policy that helped to promote grass roots contributions. But - _no surprise_ \- this Republican legislature has eliminated that tax credit, effective in 2020. _So this is your last chance to reduce your taxes by donating to a state candidate!_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KWZpGxkbwBMmnQ1tRXBsA_LuP0YPUinIHu3ZsNfcZBA=/z6AtZOdoYDt9he2AyNZkORrCOIA2MUXtJiNZuCoVo34=?refcode=taxcredit1email) **If you donate in 2019, you can still get a dollar-for-dollar tax credit of up to $50 for individual filers and $100 for joint filers. So you reduce your taxes by those amounts if you donate to the campaign committee of** **a candidate for the State House or Senate.** _(See SB 26 that grandfathered the credit 's repeal.) _ It's outrageous that with all of the loopholes in Ohio's tax code benefiting wealthy corporations, THIS is the tax credit they chose to eliminate. Let's use it before we lose it! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KWZpGxkbwBMmnQ1tRXBsA_LuP0YPUinIHu3ZsNfcZBA=/z6AtZOdoYDt9he2AyNZkORrCOIA2MUXtJiNZuCoVo34=?refcode=taxcredit1email) note: _(Friends of Betsy Rader is not a tax professional and does not provide tax advice and you should consult a qualified professional regarding your own taxes.) _
---
| Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
---
Friends of Betsy Rader
PO Box 280
Novelty OH 44072 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/KWZpGxkbwBMmnQ1tRXBsA_LuP0YPUinIHu3ZsNfcZBA=/URIORfyNPt4KMTeS7-epvYcpgUNrTdoi5kvkcAYM9XE=).

If you donate in 2019, you can still get a dollar-for-dollar tax credit of up to $50 for individual filers and $100 for joint filers. So you reduce your taxes by those amounts if you donate to the campaign committee of a candidate for the State House or Senate. (See SB 26 that grandfathered the credit 's repeal.) It's outrageous that with all of the loopholes in Ohio's tax code benefiting wealthy corporations, THIS is the tax credit they chose to eliminate. Let's use it before we lose it! note: (Friends of Betsy Rader is not a tax professional and does not provide tax advice and you should consult a qualified professional regarding your own taxes.) | Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty OH 44072 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Susan Collins
subject: I’m in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Growing up in Maine my parents taught me the value of hard work, the importance of community, and that there are often common-sense solutions to our problems if people will work together.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEzNjcxOTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcwNDY2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_

Peter,

Growing up in Maine my parents taught me the value of hard work, the importance of community, and that there are often common-sense solutions to our problems if people will work together.

These are challenging times. Our nation right now is incredibly polarized. We need experienced, strong leaders who are willing to work hard -- together -- to get things done.

**But, Peter, I know my work in the United States Senate is far from done.** We are at a crossroads for our nation's future right now, and we have an opportunity to keep our nation on a path to prosperity.

**This morning I officially announced my campaign for re-election,** and I wanted to make sure you were one of the first to hear.

I know the road ahead is not going to be easy, and this campaign is going to not only be one of the most expensive in the country, but one of the most watched as well.

[**It 's going to take all hands on deck to ensure victory next November, which is why I'm hoping you will stand with me today by making an inaugural donation to my campaign today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDEzNjcxOTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcwNDY2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I know that extreme out-of-state special interest groups will continue to attack me personally over the next year. But I will never allow anyone to bully or intimidate me into silence or voting a certain way. And you can COUNT ON THAT!

I know this may seem early to launch my campaign, but I assure you it isn't. Many dark money groups have already been actively campaigning against me, slandering my name and record and spending record amounts of money across Maine.

I need your help to send them a strong message that our team is not going to take their attacks lying down. We will have the power of thousands of supporters and will fight back with the TRUTH!

[**If I can count on you, on this historic Day ONE, please let me know right now! **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEzNjcxOTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcwNDY2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you so much for your support. I am honored to have your friendship as we enter this exciting next chapter for our nation's future together!

Sincerely,

Susan Collins

subject: Help reach one million donors → get a free sticker

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Susan Collins is running.
body:
I'm ready -- and I know you are too.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe4/4bef7a87/6a5c4722/287feb84/1651586172/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**Susan Collins just officially announced that she is running for reelection.**
Now, we know for sure who our opponent will be. And we know that national Republican donors and special interest groups will be handing over giant checks to fund her reelection efforts. This race is about to heat up fast.
I'm ready, and I know you are too. But how we respond today -- in this moment -- will determine how the rest of this campaign plays out. That's why I have to ask:
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to support our campaign today? Together, we will defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Maine first.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe4/4bef7a87/6a5c4722/287feb9b/1651586172/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191218-1-full")**
Control of the Senate is at stake, so Mitch McConnell and big Republican donors will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat for Collins. They'll try to use their money to stop our momentum.
But I know this grassroots team isn't going to let that happen.
Let's do this.
\- _Sara_
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe4/4bef7a87/6a5c4722/287feb9b/1651586172/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191218-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe4/4bef7a87/6a5c4722/287feb9a/1651586172/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe4/4bef7a87/6a5c4722/287feb99/1651586172/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe4/4bef7a87/6a5c4722/287feb98/1651586172/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

subject: I’m under attack

body:
They're attacking me for working with the White House to ensure that President Trump finally gets a chance to fight back. The left-wing tactics of Nancy Pelosi's kangaroo court end the second that impeachment comes to the Senate.

Friend,

I'm going to be brief because right now I'm under attack from the entire Democrat establishment and their allies in the liberal media.

[**DONATE HERE AND HELP MITCH FIGHT BACK**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00160gJnNr6Iv2r0T3Vz0amNPpwqKY407sVRV3uYTIfFle84AA56joi3JmKiMQazO1TsDA3gJeWDgqZmU4yVXxePDpFV6dOJnrd7V9Pa2XLBk90sDcEAdCXja6OOkdPa6CaongmNGmraVW6I72xWeq4N5h0ZEgix_G1KRwvfDQ4_iGUvPmm1ASipV900iMKyHToPZf9TiOziky97QzAfWedD_s8gAo2YoFEndUJ081EYrUy3JmOsakTh7d2aelyoASpKTVTLOaZASVL65vK49VbMtKoc-lQNtVBmv2_Twyya-Pt_09MNFIi8vJbVZlFHQVCElEe3SZCjMNjMdXmVUEk6Tsqzzf2GWv5LguGso0pFxPPEo1TE6BumQPnn7waMVFvewyuWwFGmXJBE5t5HRb2SvZPvxJay56isaJySwUAXpb0s4X3wcqiQeH4QUjYGh5CMyv7VSKEjdz0tgTpf4r3xw==&c=tkbQcOFY5CRWQo9puvChcBvcX9nQrr2w8zqIK_34AFvwXwiMOGNS6g==&ch=Mo0uDIO7ckkcZ4WAk8yK2WVEUEH806jwIBbavweovRikWBERwNJjIw==)

Here are just a few of the headlines:

"_Senator Mitch McConnell, the Republican leader, said he was taking his cues from the White House. Democrats are outraged._ " - New York Times

"_Subversion of constitutional order': Nadler slams McConnell for coordinating with White House on Senate impeachment trial_ " - CNN

"_Democrats rip McConnell after he vowed 'total coordination' with Trump White House on impeachment trial_ " - USA Today

They're attacking me for working with the White House to ensure that President Trump finally gets a chance to fight back. The left-wing tactics of Nancy Pelosi's kangaroo court end the second that impeachment comes to the Senate.

But none of this would be possible if we didn't have our Republican Senate Majority. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Give a Liberal Reporter a Lump of Coal
body:
I had some time in between my campaign duties and the rush of the holidays, and wanted to share some news regarding my Congressional campaign.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-4765758-1a82a996ef-27a98e985b)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-4765758-1a82a996ef-27a98e985b) I had some time in between my campaign duties and the rush of the holidays and wanted to share some news regarding my Congressional campaign.

As Democrats and my opponent, Lois Frankel, are counting down the hours until the vote to impeach our President, **my campaign is counting votes**.

In 2016, President Trump won Florida by 112,911 votes. It was an amazing victory and one of the main people responsible for the win (only behind the President) is Karen Giorno, former Florida chief strategist and senior advisor.

Karen is setting the strategy for my campaign and with her expertise, **we’ll not only win my race but protect Florida’s electoral votes for President Trump**.

In 2016, President Trump’s margin of victory in Florida was 1.2%.

Ad agencies working for Democrats are already planning their ads labeling President Trump “impeached,” “disgraced,” and “corrupt” in the hopes they’ll FINALLY flip Florida and win the White House in 2020.

I suspect my radical opponent is already working behind the scenes with Hillary Clinton’s other lieutenants, Debbie Wasserman-Shultz and Donna Shalala, to secure Florida’s 29 electoral votes for the Democrat presidential nominee – **and it's looking like Hillary might jump back in!**

But just as in 2016, we can stop their Hillary fantasies.

**By winning my home district – which is also President and Mrs. Trump’s voting district – Hillary’s lieutenants will have a VERY hard time flipping Florida blue.**

[HELP US WIN TODAY!](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-4765758-1a82a996ef-27a98e985b)
**We’re 13 days away from closing out our end of year report!**

In September, liberal reporters were running with the headline “Will Laura Loomer raise a dime?”

And as soon as our fundraising reports went public, they did everything they could to avoid reporting the truth that our campaign outraised my incumbent Democrat opponent . . . **and every other candidate in the race COMBINED!**

[Help us do it again by making an end of year contribution today.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-4765758-1a82a996ef-27a98e985b)

In October, _The Washington Times_ published the headline, “Loomer Outraises Dem Incumbent Frankel in House Race.”

About 40 other publications ran with the story as well . . . because it’s not very often that a non-politician outraises a seasoned, establishment incumbent.

But we did it!

**And we’re going to do it again, otherwise the headlines will be ALL NEGATIVE and liberal reporters will publish 100 headlines about how Frankel outraised me this quarter.**

If you haven’t already done so, [please send in your end of year contribution today.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-4765758-1a82a996ef-27a98e985b)

You won’t just be helping me win. You’ll be helping President Trump repeat his Florida victory . . . **and you’ll be giving leftist reporters a big-ole lump of coal in their stocking as they won’t have anything bad to write about me (unless they make it up, which they do on a daily basis)!**

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. We have just 13 days to raise another $20,000. I’m confident we can hit the goal and when we do, pro-impeachment radical Democrat Lois Frankel will be 0-2 competing against our campaign! [Help us hit the goal today](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-4765758-1a82a996ef-27a98e985b) and thank you again.

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-357100-833820-84585d41bbe610b-27a98e985b)

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b79c/18e32a7f/50abb07a/7b22bad8/680807502/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

name: MondaireForCongress.com
subject: Just announced: Democracy for America endorsed our campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire Jones for Congress
body:
We feel honored to receive their endorsement and feel fired up to keep building our grassroots movement. The only thing that could make this day any better is if we received a personal endorsement from you. | | | Friend, did you hear the news? Democracy For America — a hugely, respected organization fighting to elect progressives — just endorsed our campaign! We feel honored to receive their endorsement and feel fired up to keep building our grassroots movement. The only thing that could make this day any better is if we received a personal endorsement from you . **[Will you add your name with thousands of other Americans who are hungry for real change for working-class families?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.2xn/K_1iFcNiQ7uHv7GYPsqBdw/h0/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZiT8OBkXPvclblsAC2tjBY6Q7IVi1gEo5oIjE9bRMi-2BUa03UzSjl1tIHMf4Cr9ENmkZ1nEDR-2B0xokj5g-2F5NyeRwfWVcQrp4jm3TBsRWeI3BqHFwS46L-2FLU6BtK0lQZpBx36d4FgYwGAL5sm2HFlNmo3vGpvyr23RUbZgefAGV8lgHYgQJI982EE5SVFumlQ0hOMX-2FAzNAhFIO3-2FQTTMHeQGwgUZhdFmK8cCL-2FR6uJyvChckybD4uJ-2BUrXpxDV7IQjceysYflbgAP40wdPHGoc2bu9-2FckyYpAKXNYOUFSYTbPu/-wh8)** **_We’ll look back at your name as one of the original members of our movement._** [Give your personal endorsement »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.2xn/K_1iFcNiQ7uHv7GYPsqBdw/h1/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZiT8OBkXPvclblsAC2tjBY6Q7IVi1gEo5oIjE9bRMi-2BUa03UzSjl1tIHMf4Cr9ENmkcPIJ89YPz8WBYVl9xpqqgP7mNFHlycJJ1n3dQ0ANp9B20AzdYtmdOnzCN5gNEJSKxlQG5-2BJXCtr-2F97Kj-2Fa9y9IPG6ax3FJLd6VmB04mH8P-2FALlrMcDjyUB7P229YGeu1cf980bZLQrE31hW-2FMEN-2F6l8ejbwp3cf9A6fGMtl2RuKxWW-2FvwcO50PDiWWTbpPUpNMiPc-2B8Y5CdIMLGeD1nNabEhxWS2ZWvHnQ3mION6RYn/TVyx) Here’s the statement the CEO of Democracy for America released when they announced their endorsement: | _“Mondaire Jones understands firsthand the struggles that working families, people of color, and LGBTQ+ people face every single day in our country. As a member of the U.S. House, he’ll be a steadfast champion for big, bold progressive ideas like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, while breaking barriers with the unique life experience he’ll bring with him to Congress."
_
**_— Yvette Simpson, CEO, Democracy for America_**
---
[Give your personal endorsement »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.2xn/K_1iFcNiQ7uHv7GYPsqBdw/h2/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZiT8OBkXPvclblsAC2tjBY6Q7IVi1gEo5oIjE9bRMi-2BUa03UzSjl1tIHMf4Cr9ENmkSytd31k-2BQfbagXno6-2Bl5ApNyh18LO-2Bfvmu1XU-2FOzehB8cR4CDLVdMCjh-2FsnmsLoFsNXxtfClnhe0z3FaqvMDEEkqjMWXiFDRrDeFHbJX9JwZXaGnk81AMaBLTEBGN1ZxmgfarAq-2FIdum8HSdLhuTnW-2FoCVoHHFCCeiWAkkqPbCz5rWMCIoXOJFjYPeVZyxitul-2FAssknUP5PT-2FIvNYGQOzoxQ7dls4IeEimrP2-2BG9Qh/E7dH)
****
We’re so excited to have Democracy for America at our back.

They understand that Mondaire isn’t running because he has the most money or endorsements from other elected officials to win this race: **he’s running because he knows what it’s like to not have a lot of money and to feel powerless in the face of challenges so many working-class families face.**
So even though we might not be the most well-funded campaign in this race, **we know that the most important resource to win is you.**
When people work side-by-side on the issues they care about most, that energy is contagious. We’re fighting for our progressive values — _the stuff we really believe in, not what’s easy to say_ — and, because of that, we’re confident that this people-powered campaign can move mountains if need be.
****
**[Will you add your name and personally endorse our people-powered campaign for Congress? Your endorsement will be a powerful sign of what this movement is all about.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.2xn/K_1iFcNiQ7uHv7GYPsqBdw/h3/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZiT8OBkXPvclblsAC2tjBY6Q7IVi1gEo5oIjE9bRMi-2BUa03UzSjl1tIHMf4Cr9ENmkeENz8HDkMETRVZIByQEvBfX2zbrL5MiyCrBte4-2FXzGEFwDa2fApLAAYEk2egs6OUEJoRCAwE-2F-2B8mskiVordPpQQUc1tfHLtxD3c3tfQ-2BVs7itPUrL9Ill-2BgxGhMujr1a-2FQGbqW10N7Y3UoJ9xIquGjJSDwdXbi2Nv1YXq3FLKshZ9r-2BFE6hjsFL5VVuQNdcFJ06UgB8BMPwKloPMDeAMpkI4iQmrn3oi19k95cyUnrt/Hz85)**
[Give your personal endorsement »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.2xn/K_1iFcNiQ7uHv7GYPsqBdw/h4/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZiT8OBkXPvclblsAC2tjBY6Q7IVi1gEo5oIjE9bRMi-2BUa03UzSjl1tIHMf4Cr9ENmkd-2FISHHfy84eu5kNW9oUReaMqJf01set6F3YCmPpVPH1igT7dnC3ZtDTxHmoloVXPuDO1cqLsLW7YveeUOFFt29Y9lemYgcd1CKPfIlpFK5Yv3LdkrDC8pT1k6pn-2FExFYgPo6s5-2FvOBUvDh2qP-2Bg17sPWwZoTE-2B7lguoi6BHkyVIR-2BJ7NqWizroTJ-2BrxXnqxfgW3UypdAQjBxglr2YNHOpdef3gqSVfW5UuasrnknKnP/7tWy)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: No one will outwork this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're going to win this race because we're going to work the hardest.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a9/7f51f7bc/4a73155b/4ef0d779/2396612396/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906a9/7f51f7bc/4a73155b/4ef0d778/2396612396/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191218.1nd__647__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Hey Peter,

**We 're going to win this race because we're going to work the hardest. **

It's not even 2020 yet, and we've already traveled over 11,000 miles and talked with more than 10,000 Texans. From meeting with union members in apprentice shops and on the picket line, to discussing gun violence in living rooms full of passionate activists, to marching in lively parades -- I'm meeting folks where they are, to hear what actually matters to them.

It's true that Senator Cornyn has nearly $11 million to pour onto Texas airwaves. But **what 's going to win this race is a true grassroots campaign built by and for the people.

That's why I'm asking for your support to keep fueling this campaign -- so we can work together to win Texas. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Yang
subject: Andrew wants to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Will you share with Andrew what Humanity First means to you?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR) Yang Gang --

Yesterday, we sent an email asking what was most important to you going into 2020. We noticed that you didn’t send in your response yet, so we wanted to give you one more chance to make your voice heard before Andrew steps on the debate stage tomorrow night.

[Will you share with Andrew what issues are most important to you going into 2020? ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-issues-survey-20191217?source=email-20191218am-all&t=7&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR) | [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-issues-survey-20191217?source=email-20191218am-all&t=8&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR)
---
Thank you,

Team Yang

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Yang
Date: Mon, Dec 16, 2019 at 12:31 PM
Subject: Response needed: Can you take our survey before the debate?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=2&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR) Yang Gang --

In a few days, Andrew’s taking the debate stage once again.

[Before he does, he wants to hear from you about the issues that matter the most. Can you take a quick issues survey and share what topics you think should be highlighted on the debate stage on Thursday? ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-issues-survey-20191217?source=email-20191218am-all&t=9&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR) | [Take the Survey](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-issues-survey-20191217?source=email-20191218am-all&t=10&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR)
---
Andrew knows why he’s running, and he’s extremely tapped into the passions and values of the Yang Gang. But he wants to make sure that you feel represented at the debate. So before he takes the stage, please share what matters most to you.

Thank you for everything you do!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20073?t=3&akid=4904%2E377263%2EWgbqGR)

body:
Your support has been absolutely crucial to our success this year and I couldn’t be more thankful for everything you’ve done over the last 12 months. Friend, I just wanted to reach out and say thank you.
Your support has been absolutely crucial to our success this year and I couldn’t be more thankful for everything you’ve done over the last 12 months.
But before we enter full-blown holiday mode, I wanted to tell you how much I’m looking forward to keeping this progress rolling into 2020. We’re ready and raring to hit the ground running with our campaign on January 1 and beyond...and I’d be honored if you’d be willing to chip in to make that happen.
If you want to help us start 2020 on the right foot, please consider donating at this safe and secure link below: **[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/action-920278/](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=674b927783dd4f1fa1d98ddaf41f8e11&_e=ZK8VKGKxMusZp3rYXUGxvY_4zMCRqxLJRPimH-27ynBRKljZkR7wAtm8JMzjJ6VX1T-o3zA2K8QYUKAgl8-d9NhJHmGVjPSWP7TT9TlcI-poP-v6J9weju8kYG5c-JSnXUQYMQxazSkOJCrlgMSWHBvbT64UTYQAtC3zMCyH_jRIETgoqMNtVe8gbUq48NbkmuLxMpp793vmdKEcn8LMYWI8ixOB236HfrCwlrgVK7nSPCIXlcR7njX9endcm8KiPlFfPlb36BoiJ7Lt-vCp4FwamvdbhM-QbsfJ36zqndzkL_W2K5DEh4VNLJioZRLEg7RLJrWmA6MMalNwKTBHSCwj_iFeYqjxe7e3l0Tfbs9ryIFU8Hu2reOvDh3my-XsSqUeyQaChLhnx9WYL-5uWc9SAdgAvITpFZSvXv9isV8%3D)**

Friend,

2019 is almost over and you’ve been there for us every step of the way.

We could not be more grateful for all of the donations and volunteer hours that our grassroots community has given Governor Holcomb over the last year. Your support has been absolutely crucial to our success, but there’s still a long road ahead.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=674b927783dd4f1fa1d98ddaf41f8e11&_e=ZK8VKGKxMusZp3rYXUGxvY_4zMCRqxLJRPimH-27ynBRKljZkR7wAtm8JMzjJ6VX1T-o3zA2K8QYUKAgl8-d9NhJHmGVjPSWP7TT9TlcI-poP-v6J9weju8kYG5c-JSnXUQYMQxazSkOJCrlgMSWHBvbT64UTYQAtC3zMCyH_jRIETgoqMNtVe8gbUq48NbkncOT1pdyvvayEasDGK5JwMTENezcUACYZQfts3ZwnWqF_GU7YWLGJXMZjs74Udsu25iFMcbpZfsjF4I4LyMy6PM2Eje7lc6fDc48IRgi78QFnTRVTMC5IHnPTZMwcuxDb3IrOW1Wk892d9THzAN-0-Jw0rKoZ75VD364tIlyozFtFHHexw5ltPkn4PU45BW1LM34ado2fKyaMJpksZfWhtpAvY6SAXMsFft8DcyCjMA%3D)

_If we want to keep Putting People First and delivering for all Hoosiers in 2020 and beyond, we’re going to need our grassroots community in all 92 counties to be**all in** starting today — we can’t do this without you, and we can’t wait until next year to get started. _

That’s why we launched our **2019 End of Year Fundraising Campaign.** If you want to see Governor Holcomb hit the ground running in 2020, making a contribution to our campaign now will give us the critical resources we need.

We’re hitting the ground running into 2020, and we need the continued support of the Holcomb Crew. Consider making your contribution before midnight on New Year’s Eve.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Voter apathy and suppression could cost us the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. But if Democrats fail to show up to vote in 2020, Trump will win again, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, calling white supremacists "very fine people," and calling his impeachment a "lynching." That all will look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. Right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $1,750 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy in 2020. Peter we do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. [**If you care about stopping Trump, electing a Democrat to the White House in 2020, and removing Mitch McConnell from power, then please, we 're asking you to please donate $5 or more immediately to support our work turning out voters, stopping GOP voter suppression, taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell, and getting Trump out of the White House. Can you give just $5 now?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf76/6e9863e8/175e04e7/1db0b016/2847247684/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191218a.ND&refcode2=Memh3xsqitlMrgLneDGQ") Your help is critical to pushing back and winning in 2020. name: Mark Warner
subject: Bill Barr has failed his office. Should he resign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The attorney general is our nation's top law enforcement official and if he's unwilling to place the rule of law over his own political opinions, he can't be trusted at the helm of the Department of J
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d73c/53d9897e/538fa5ee/1c89fe33/837512249/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-barrsurvey")
---
Derek,

President George Washington signed the Judiciary Act into law in September 1789, creating the Office of the Attorney General. Since that time, **we 've relied on the occupants of that office to defend the rule of law -- at all costs and at all times.**

But the current Attorney General, Bill Barr, hasn't spent his time defending the rule of law. Instead, he's bent over backward to provide political cover for the President, prioritized partisan talking points over the facts, and attacked the professionalism of hard-working law enforcement officials.

**Frankly, that 's disqualifying. **The attorney general is our nation's top law enforcement official and if he's unwilling to place the rule of law over his own political opinions, he can't be trusted at the helm of the Department of Justice.

**[I believe Bill Barr should resign from his position, effective immediately. Do you agree? Take my survey and let me know.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d73c/53d9897e/538fa5ee/1c89fe33/837512249/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-barrsurvey")**
* Recently, after the DOJ inspector general concluded that there was no evidence of political bias in the FBI's probe into the Trump campaign, Attorney General Barr publicly disputed the findings, placing his own political opinions over the facts of the matter.

* Earlier this year, right before Special Counsel Robert Mueller released his report into Russian interference in the 2016 election and possible Trump campaign contacts with Russian intelligence, Attorney General Barr released his own "summary" of the report, which fundamentally omitted key conclusions and misinterpreted others in an attempt to protect the President.

**These are the actions of an attorney general who 's simply unable to perform the duties of his office independently from his political allegiances. **

**[Bill Barr must resign. What do you think? Do you agree? Tell me your thoughts.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d73c/53d9897e/538fa5ee/1c89fe33/837512249/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-barrsurvey")**

-- Mark

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d73c/53d9897e/538fa5ee/1c89fe32/837512249/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191218_s_1_fl__395__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d73c/53d9897e/538fa5ee/1c89fe31/837512249/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
