name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Thank you for your help & last favor of year!
body:
It's been just six months since we began this race to return bold and effective leadership to Pinellas County | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9adf891251fd/in-case-you-missed-it-1433197?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Friend,

This morning, House Democrats will vote on a partisan basis to impeach President Trump. This unfortunate vote concludes three years of a witch-hunt against the President. Let’s not forget, Speaker Pelosi and Democrats, including Charlie Crist, were intent on impeaching President Trump before he was even sworn into office. Now, more than ever, it is critical that we return bold and effective conservative leadership to Pinellas County and restore Republican control to the House of Representatives.

I want to thank you for your support for our campaign to defeat Charlie Crist. With your support, we have outraised my four primary opponents 4:1 because of your generosity and commitment to helping me take back this seat. ([See our press release on Q3 numbers here](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=b61c7cecaf&e=bbeef49760))

This impeachment represents an unconstitutional abuse of power by the Democratic Party, but the good news is we DO have a say in this matter. With a Republican controlled Congress, we can get back to doing the business of our great nation. The path to a Republican majority runs right here, through Florida’s 13th district! With your continued financial support, we fully intend to return this seat back to Republican control as it was for 45 years, from 1971 through 2016.

**As the quarter ends on 12/31,[](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=3afada0f98&e=bbeef49760)****I am asking for your contribution to help us reach our fundraising goal for 2019. Thank you so much for your help of $100, $250, $500, $2,800 or ...$5,600?**

Below are just some of the headlines, endorsements and other progress we’ve made since we kicked things off.

_**Amanda in the News:**_ We have achieved great headlines since the start of our campaign in June, including:
* **“Five new GOP Women to Watch in 2020”** from the [Washington Examiner](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=6c6ac4c946&e=bbeef49760);
* **“Amanda Makki Could Pose Serious Threat to Charlie Crist”** from [The Floridian](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=19a2db22bc&e=bbeef49760),
* **“Democrat Charlie Crist, a onetime GOP governor of Florida, faces a serious challenge from Republican Amanda Makki, who has raised an impressive $418,000 since announcing her campaign in June.”** from [Roll Call](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=77dec78573&e=bbeef49760)
* Please watch my interview with [One America News Network](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=3dbf9bcafa&e=bbeef49760) on President Trump, the threat of Iran and the Democrats pushing forward with Impeachment.

_**Endorsements:**_
* We have **over a dozen** current Members of Congress and the U.S. Senate who have either formally endorsed or have financially invested in our campaign.
* We have the endorsement of NY GOP Congresswoman **Elise Stefanik** , who has been tasked by the GOP to select the top 11 GOP female candidates nationwide (out of 170) and has provided each of our campaigns with **$10,000 in funding!**
* We have the designation of the NRCC Young Guns “On the Radar” – 43 GOP candidates **selected by the Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy** for achieving metrics to be top frontrunner candidates nationwide
* You can find our full list of endorsements [here](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=9faa1f1047&e=bbeef49760).

_**WHY WE CAN WIN!**_
* Florida’s **best political team** is advising our campaign, the same team who helped **Pam Bondi and Ashley Moody** get elected Attorneys General for the state of Florida. (**Ashley Moody, also a female attorney, won this district by 4 percent!**)
* **President Trump’s Pollsters, McLaughlin & Associates, are also polling for us, and believe that my profile can only beat Charlie Crist. **
* As a Christian and a female born in the Middle East, I can give Republicans their own _**proverbial ‘counter-punch’**_ to socialist, anti-Israel members in Congress like **AOC, Rashida Talib and Ilhan Omar** without ever letting them play the victim card like they do with President Trump!

**In order to keep my frontrunner status, I would greatly appreciate any support you can[](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=3cab5d15d0&e=bbeef49760)****provide before the end of this month** so we can reach our end-of-year goal. You can make an online contribution [**here**](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=9d31a152ad&e=bbeef49760) or via check to the address below.

_By law, the maximum contribution for a couple is $11,200, and $5,600 per individual. The 2020 Primary Election and 2020 General Election, is $2,800 for each, totaling $5,600 per individual and $11,200 per couple. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals (without “green cards”) and federal government contractors are prohibited. Contributions to Amanda Makki for Congress are not tax deductible. _

Please help me achieve another strong quarter and reach my fundraising goal for 2019 by making a contribution today!

[](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=839e7e897e&e=bbeef49760)

I hope you and your family have a blessed Christmas and a happy Hanukkah! I look forward to hearing from you!

Gratefully,

---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2019 Amanda Makki for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Amanda Makki for CongressPO Box 47483St Petersburg, FL 33743-7483
[Add us to your address book](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=109b3f0d9f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=109b3f0d9f&e=bbeef49760) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=109b3f0d9f&e=bbeef49760&c=d81a995f5b).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/monkey-rewards/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monkey_rewards&aid=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&afl=1)
---

body:

| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaf7/5721a3ed/7189408b/efab633/2900774168/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend -

**Donald Trump is on his way to Michigan RIGHT NOW, but we're falling $6,318 short of our rapid response goal!** Before Trump takes the stage, here are three things you need to know:
| | | | Gary's right-wing opponent supports the president "2,000%" - and both Trump and Mitch McConnell have helped funnel **_$3 million_** into Michigan to defeat Gary and flip this seat red. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Senate control hinges on what happens here in Michigan, and right now, a recent poll shows Gary **_TIED_** with his extremist opponent! |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the **_ONLY_** way Democrats CAN take back the Senate is if we win in Michigan. |
---|---|---|---
With just a few hours until Trump touches down in Michigan, our fundraising is falling short.

body:
| | |

| |

| | Tomorrow's debate will lack the diversity it had at the beginning of this process -- I did not meet the DNC polling requirements to make the stage. I will not be there to raise the issues that matter most to us, the issues that impact our most vulnerable communities. Nevertheless, we will keep shaping this conversation. **These thresholds won 't decide who wins this race, _you will._ ** [So, before the debate begins tomorrow, let's raise our voices and make it clear why this campaign is so important. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc946/3eb3e2fc/69389850/744ef29f/1482754026/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+So+before+the+debate+begins+tomorrow+let&utm_campaign=20191218_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191218_em_fr_b1_castro_all") **Be loud for the marginalized. ** **Be loud for justice. ** **To build an America where nobody is left behind, where everyone can reach their dreams - BE LOUD. ** [Add your voice. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Tim Ryan
subject: critical deadline ❗️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
BREAKING (OH-13): We're facing two deep-pocketed Republican opponents | | Team - The race is heating up here in Ohio's 13th district! Just days ahead of today's filing deadline, we found out a new formidable Republican candidate may run against us: [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb97a/1650366012/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?recurring=1&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_img&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Just days before, another Republican was reported to be considering joining our campaign. It's clear that Donald Trump and Republican party bosses are putting a target on our district. That's why two high-profile Republicans are planning last-minute campaigns. **GOP leaders have promised them that they 'll flood our district with special-interest, right-wing money to roll back the work we've done.** As Republicans make this seat a clear target, I need to make sure we have the resources to keep fighting for everyday people in Northeast Ohio. We can't let Republicans take this seat if we want to hold control of the House in 2020. [Will you stand with me? Your grassroots support is critical to making sure we can mount a strong campaign, amplify our message to supporters, and fight back against Republican attacks. Rush your donation today to show Republicans they'll have a fight on their hands in Ohio:](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb97d/1650366012/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?recurring=1&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **[Give $5 Now->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb97c/1650366012/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_el_5")** **[Give $20.20 Now->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb97f/1650366012/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?express_lane=true&amount=20.20&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_el_20.20")** **[Give $50 Now->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb97e/1650366012/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_el_50")** **[Give $200 Now->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb961/1650366012/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_el_200")** **[Or, donate another amount](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb960/1650366012/VEsB/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?refcode=191218_tr_deadline_el_other")** We need to keep fighting to keep good paying jobs in the United States, make college accessible to all, and make sure everyone can access the healthcare they need. This is a critical moment. **As we face the filing deadline, we now face formidable opposition.** We can't afford to let Donald Trump and deep-pocketed special interests drown our voices out. Our campaign is funded by real people. **[That's why I'm asking you to consider chipping in $13, or whatever you can spare, to keep our district blue.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb963/1650366012/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryandeadline?recurring=1&refcode=191218_tr_deadline_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for being part of this fight, \-- Tim

* * *

| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb962/1650366012/VEsP/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforamerica") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb965/1650366012/VEsHBQ/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb964/1650366012/VEsHBA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb967/1650366012/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a6e/5486deaa/3e1c3d58/dcbb966/1650366012/VEsHBg/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

subject: These Have Been the Best Few Weeks of Trump’s Presidency
body:
House Democrats will vote to impeach President Donald J. Trump tonight. "Yet these past few weeks have arguably been the best of Trump’s presidency." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4e3265ebe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **These Have Been the Best Few Weeks of Trump’s Presidency**

House Democrats will vote to impeach President Donald J. Trump tonight. “Yet these past few weeks have arguably been the best of Trump’s presidency — not despite impeachment, but in no small part because of it,” Marc Thiessen writes in _The Washington Post._

The accomplishments are many: USMCA is set to replace NAFTA, China has agreed to a major Phase 1 trade deal with America, and our booming economy is lifting wages and slashing income inequality. Even some Democrats are figuring that out: One of them, Rep. Jeff Van Drew (N-DJ), just announced he is switching to the Republican Party.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=10ddaae22a&e=3ee4985eea)

**Meltdown:**[CNN legal analyst says ‘I don’t believe’ CNN poll showing support for impeachment is down](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=881e46636e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Ford Motor Co. is adding 3,000 jobs at two factories in the Detroit area and investing $1.45 billion to build new pickup trucks, SUVs, and electric and autonomous vehicles . . . Hiring will begin next year for the jobs that will pay on average about $61,000 a year,” Tom Krisher and David Eggert report for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ecfa20f815&e=3ee4985eea "https://apnews.com/e446084754e0fea7a4de2dd322446b97").
---
|
---
| Once again, Democrats’ partisan politics have backfired: “President Trump’s job approval rating has ticked up 6 percentage points since the Democrats' impeachment inquiry began, according to a new survey.” A majority of Americans also oppose impeachment and removing President Trump from office, Owen Daugherty reports in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fcb77f684b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The top judge on the federal court overseeing U.S. surveillance activities just issued a stunning and unprecedented rebuke of the James Comey–led FBI. Judge Rosemary Collyer scolded the FBI for providing false and misleading information in applications to wiretap a former Trump campaign adviser, Chuck Ross reports for [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bde324494&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90938d5406&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4f48e87f1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=87b526080e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: ORTT ENDORSED BY NIAGARA COUNTY CONSERVATIVE PARTY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| **ORTT ENDORSED BY NIAGARA COUNTY CONSERVATIVE PARTY**
_A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_ Niagara County, NY --- Today, New York State Senator Rob Ortt, U.S. Army combat veteran, and candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District received the endorsement of the Niagara County Conservative Party. This endorsement comes days after the New York State Conservative Party released its 2019 ratings for New York State Legislators, in which Ortt scored a perfect “100 percent.”

“New York’s 27th Congressional District needs a conservative, battle-tested patriot representing its constituents and defending our President,” said Ortt. “I’m honored that the members Niagara County Conservative Party have entrusted me with their support. Conservatism starts at the local level and it’s been my pleasure working with local conservatives to protect the rights of taxpayers, gun owners, and the unborn while defending our borders, our veterans, and our President.”

While serving in the Senate, Ortt has fought back against the extreme and ultra-progressive ideologies perpetuated by New York City’s liberal elites and avowed self-proclaimed Democratic Socialists. He has advocated for not only conservative fiscal policies but has pushed back against extreme social policies such as New York’s “Abortion on Demand” law, driver’s licenses for illegal aliens, and unconstitutional anti-Second Amendment bills.

“I’ve had the opportunity to meet with many of the candidates for the 27th Congressional District, and it’s clear that Rob Ortt best reflects our conservative values,” said Niagara County Conservative Party Chairman William L. Ross. “With his decorated service to our nation and respected track record as an elected official, Senator Ortt has the qualities we want in a leader representing our community in Washington. Rob Ortt has been an excellent leader in our community, and our Committee confidently supports him for the 27th Congressional District seat.”

Since joining the New York State Legislature, Ortt has been consistently ranked as one of the most conservative legislators, receiving the top conservative rating in three of his five years of service.
###
_After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

clean_body: = Hi Peter, We still need 342 signatures on our petition calling on the Trump Administration to remain in the Paris Climate Agreement before the end of the day. ** Thank you, Nick Meier Campaign Manager \--------Forwarded Message-------- From: Elisa Cardnell Date: Tuesday, December 17 Subject: Trump is endangering our future To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, As natural disasters like Harvey, the wildfires in California, and flooding along the Mississippi ravage our country the Trump administration continues to ignore the simple truth - we have a climate crisis at hand and something needs to be done NOW. Rather than taking action to fight potentially the greatest crisis of our lifetime, Trump has decided to pull out of the Paris Climate Accord. This is an act of willful ignorance - period. This is an outrage and a threat to the future of our planet. We have seen, firsthand here in Houston, the damage that climate change has on our communities and our safety. Thank you for all that you do, Elisa Cardnell ** Do you follow us on and ? Join us there to see more campaign updates! = Days until the Texas Primary Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Americans nationwide this week met the woman who will unseat Sen. Thom Tillis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2020 Campaign Committee
body:
My friends,

What a week this has been for our campaign to send Thom Tillis packing and help flip the U.S. Senate!

Along with our continuing work to inspire and organize North Carolina's young voters, elders, voters of color and white voters, and progressives and moderates to coalesce around my bid to become North Carolina's first African-American U.S. Senator, this week we also began reaching out to concerned Americans _nationwide_ to explain the importance of their support too for my candidacy. Because while it's still true, as Tip O'Neill once said, that "all politics is local," today more than ever all politics is also _national_. To save our democracy, concerned citizens nationwide must join together to support _every_ Democratic candidate who, like myself, is best positioned to flip a U.S. Senate seat.

Our outreach to America this week began with a wonderful profile of my candidacy published at Daily Kos, America's leading online progressive community:

[**In North Carolina, an inspiring Black woman Senate candidate takes the lead**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eY2G-YGESjniEKd8lWO65zAf4iEeiq_1xIYHka2v9JM=/T5-x0Uy7cXCKhHdAhONwQFOd_6TXF-ajz3XKxCZ3sYg=)

Beginning with my family's farming heritage, the article goes on to make the case for how my life experience _" seems custom-made to bridge the demographic and social divides that have for too long fractured North Carolina's electorate." _If you haven't read it yet, by all means do.

We also reached out to the wider world via my interview on Pacifica Radio's nationally syndicated progressive radio program, BradCast, where I explained in depth the election security threat North Carolina's voters face at the hands of voting machine vendor ES&S, and why I'm fighting for the state to offer hand-marked paper ballots to voters in all 100 of NC's counties. You can listen online at [soundcloud.com/progressive-voices/the-bradcast-12-16-2019](https://act.myngp.com/el/eY2G-YGESjniEKd8lWO65zAf4iEeiq_1xIYHka2v9JM=/cVreGB_wOgmZlCCg4AMuOcVv3QCDeCYQfNWB4eTSjsw=) (my segment begins at the 36:00 minute mark).

I also did my share this week to support the nationwide "Nobody Is Above The Law" rallies and marches that I'm sure you've read about. I was deeply honored to give the kick-off speech at Raleigh's well-attended rally (one of nearly 500 across the nation; see photo below). We'll be posting the video of my speech on [my campaign web site](https://act.myngp.com/el/eY2G-YGESjniEKd8lWO65zAf4iEeiq_1xIYHka2v9JM=/JFPmm18MFwYreLx-X2_t54Dt66FLL8KcbGKckm11-_0=) later this week, and I look forward to reading your responses to it on social media.

As you can see, I'm running hard for all of us. **And I need to ask you to work hard to help me.** If you haven't contributed to my campaign recently, won't you please do so now by visiting **[my ActBlue Donate page](https://act.myngp.com/el/eY2G-YGESjniEKd8lWO65zAf4iEeiq_1xIYHka2v9JM=/mNaBfI5bNs_HdgUbMTw2chNxu06kjBkdWtrikurKk-w=)**? And please spread the word among your friends, neighbors, and associates, and encourage them to donate too. Our critical end-of-year FEC reporting deadline is now right around the corner, and every donor's contribution sends a powerful message that my grassroots campaign is powered by "People, Not PACs" (unlike my opponent's).

Thank you so very much for supporting me,

North Carolina state Senator Erica Smith,
running for the Democratic nomination to unseat Republican U.S. Senator Thom Tillis

Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2020 Campaign Committee
---
Erica For US
PO Box 1236
Gaston NC 27832 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/eY2G-YGESjniEKd8lWO65zAf4iEeiq_1xIYHka2v9JM=/Qe0EMCmtvKxrYjfqMlN2z2CGTELcjjrBg8kIwtZBEtw=).

name: Crime Watch via 314
subject: Today the House of Representatives is going to vote on two articles of impeachment, we need to know if you stand with Democrats in holding the President accountable for his crimes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| | Today, the House of Representatives will defend our Constitution by voting on two articles of impeachment against President Trump. The evidence supporting these articles is overwhelming, but we need to hear from the American people:

[Do you support this historic and somber effort? Let us know your thoughts by taking our Official Impeachment Survey ](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/official-impeachment-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Do+you+support+this+historic+and+somber+&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/official-impeachment-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Take+the+Survey&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")
---
* * *
Team,

We know that Donald Trump is corrupt, we know that Republicans will do anything in their power to protect him, and we know that it is the Constitutional duty of Congress to hold the president accountable.

Today, the House of Representatives will vote on articles of impeachment for only the third time in our nation's history -- and thanks to the GOP's bootlicking, this one breaks all precedents. [We are in uncharted territory for our country, so it is vitally important we hear from you.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/official-impeachment-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+We+are+in+uncharted+territory+for+our+co&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")

[Where do you stand on impeachment? We need 4,141 activists to take our survey before the vote later today so that we can plan our next move.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/official-impeachment-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Where+do+you+stand+on+impeachment+if+con&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")
| [Impeachment Survey](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/official-impeachment-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Impeachment+Survey&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")
---
Senate Republicans aren't even going to pretend to listen to the evidence. They will ignore every crime this President has committed because they don't care about our Constitution -- they only care about remaining in power.

When that happens, we need to prove we can take action. Vulnerable Republican Senators need to know that there will be consequences for undermining a fair and legal process, but we can only do that if we have the full support of our activists.

**Let us know if you 'll stand with us on impeachment by taking our survey now.**

[https://secure.314action.org/ImpeachmentSurvey](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/official-impeachment-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+httpssecure314actionorgImpeachmentSurvey&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")

Thanks for your help,

Crime Watch via 314 Action

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4361/4bd7760e/458c3745/77ad3624/954950838/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NThjMzc0NSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MzYxIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/458c3745/29bb4361?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4361/4bd7760e/458c3745/77ad3621/954950838/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_180OP_191218_1_2")** to make a donation.

clean_body: | | Today, the House of Representatives will defend our Constitution by voting on two articles of impeachment against President Trump. The evidence supporting these articles is overwhelming, but we need to hear from the American people: "" | | "" Team, We know that Donald Trump is corrupt, we know that Republicans will do anything in their power to protect him, and we know that it is the Constitutional duty of Congress to hold the president accountable. Today, the House of Representatives will vote on articles of impeachment for only the third time in our nation's history -- and thanks to the GOP's bootlicking, this one breaks all precedents. "" "" | "" Senate Republicans aren't even going to pretend to listen to the evidence. They will ignore every crime this President has committed because they don't care about our Constitution -- they only care about remaining in power. When that happens, we need to prove we can take action. Vulnerable Republican Senators need to know that there will be consequences for undermining a fair and legal process, but we can only do that if we have the full support of our activists. Let us know if you 'll stand with us on impeachment by taking our survey now. "" Thanks for your help, Crime Watch via 314 Action Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP trying to purge 234,000 voters in a critical swing state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, you read that right: up to 234,000 Wisconsin voters are about to be purged from the records, per the order of a county judge. After voting for Trump by less than 23,000 votes in 2016, Wisconsin swung blue for now Gov. Tony Evers in 2018 by 30,000 votes. Wisconsin will be critical in 2020, and this Republican-appointed judge's interpretation of a wildly gerrymandered Republican legislature's partisan law could cost us four more years of Trump. [**When Democrats Turn Out 's mission is to fight back against voter suppression tactics and get voters to the polls so we can ensure the future of our democracy and voting rights in America, but we can't do it alone. If you believe GOP voter suppression threatens the right to vote itself, we need you to stand with us today -- the 2020 election is in less than 11 months, so we need as many engaged Democrats to sign our pledge now to fight GOP voter suppression!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf78/6e9863e8/175ba25a/1db0b018/542807036/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ub58sn9b") Thank you for standing up for democracy. -WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf78/6e9863e8/175ba25a/1db0b018/542807036/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ub58sn9b")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc947/3eb3e2fc/693e79ca/744efdf3/339998571/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191218_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191218_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc947/3eb3e2fc/693e79ca/744efdf2/339998571/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191218_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191218_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc947/3eb3e2fc/693e79ca/744efdf1/339998571/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191218_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191218_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Laura Carlson
subject: Vote now on our new card design!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | | Team - it's that time of year again: 2019 DGA memberships are expiring, and we're launching our 2020 membership drive.

But this year we thought we'd do something a little different. We're rolling out a brand new membership card design - and YOU get to select it!

That's right: we're asking our grassroots supporters to vote on the new card so you can carry your Democratic values with you. **[Vote for your favorite card design before we close the poll!](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3MzY5ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTI2NTI3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
[](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY3MzY5ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTI2NTI3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**** There are 11 governors' races on the ballot in 2020, and we have the historic opportunity to win in key swing states across the country. We're not going to take a single race for granted, but we can't compete without our members' support.
[**Cast your vote now - then show your support with a gift of ANY amount and we'll send you your personalized DGA card (we'll even cover shipping)!**](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3MzY5ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTI2NTI3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Happy voting,

Laura Carlson
DGA Digital Director****

| | | [VOTE](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3MzY5ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTI2NTI3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In the weeks to come, it's absolutely crucial that we grow our movement as much as possible. That means expanding our operations across the country, hiring more organizers, and spreading our message of big, structural change.

**So we've set a goal of reaching one million unique grassroots donors and with your help, we can make it happen.**

[**To stay on track to hit this goal as soon as possible, we need 133 more people from Pennsylvania to contribute today. Will you be one of the 133? >
When Elizabeth takes the debate stage tomorrow night, she'll be making the case for big, structural change that will rewrite the rules of Washington to put working people first.

It's time our government and economy work for all Americans, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And Elizabeth doesn't just talk the talk, she walks the walk with how we're raising money -- no Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. Just grassroots donors chipping in what they can.

Your support helps hire organizers in communities across the country, helps host town halls where Elizabeth talks with voters about the issues that matter to them, and helps grow our movement nationwide.

[**We can't thank you enough for your support. We'd be so grateful if you could be one of the 133 from Pennsylvania and make your first contribution today to help hit our goal of one million grassroots donors.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc8b/45c30650/11038b2ee/66fbd9e2/3973691285/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTc3Rl9FR1JfTUNHX1BfMjAxOTEyMThfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM77F_EGR_MCG_P_20191218_V1S1_P")

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

Your support helps hire organizers in communities across the country, helps host town halls where Elizabeth talks with voters about the issues that matter to them, and helps grow our movement nationwide. "" Thanks for everything, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Friend,
West Virginia elected a Democratic governor in 2016, and in less than seven months, Jim Justice switched to the Republican party.
I’m a life-long Democrat and have spent my career fighting for working families. This is about public service, not self-service.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Defending our Democracy and representing Arizonans in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Good afternoon,
Today I am taking a solemn vote to protect the integrity of our Democracy and to uphold my Constitutional duty to defend our nation.
**But today 's vote is just one of many that I have made as a Member of Congress to represent my Arizona constituents.**
Whereas some special interests have been repeating a false claim about "Do-Nothing Democrats," we've actually been _quite busy_ passing legislation to help every day Americans.
* I was a leader in fighting for a bipartisan, new USMCA trade deal with Mexico and Canada, which will bring thousands of new jobs and millions in investment to Arizona communities, in addition to securing critical labor and environmental protections. This new trade deal will be voted on tomorrow in the House!
* I am proud to have been the lead sponsor on the LABEL Opioids Act, which will protect Arizona communities from misleading information on the danger of opioids, and as a co-sponsor of the 100% Clean Economy Act, which will commit the United States to 100% clean energy by 2050.
* I have voted for commonsense resolutions to fund our national security, lower prescription drug costs, and improve our infrastructure, all of which are sitting on Mitch McConnell's desk waiting for the Senate to actually take real action.

**It has been the honor of my lifetime to work in Congress on behalf of the People of Arizona 's Ninth Congressional District and I hope I can have your support in my campaign for re-election.**
[**If you support my work in fighting for commonsense solutions for Arizona families, will you chip in to my re-election campaign committee today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VIqgu6cPhmXo7OUXWHF4nSqC0QTdsACuJDvprBa9IUA=/Goi0ygeM3xBJmeAY0vNOZXZW4TburdHt5as8G11Gvmg=?refcode=X_121819_HouseVotes_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VIqgu6cPhmXo7OUXWHF4nSqC0QTdsACuJDvprBa9IUA=/Goi0ygeM3xBJmeAY0vNOZXZW4TburdHt5as8G11Gvmg=?refcode=X_121819_HouseVotes_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)
I am grateful for your continued support,
\-- _Greg Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
_If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/VIqgu6cPhmXo7OUXWHF4nSqC0QTdsACuJDvprBa9IUA=/Lh3bVcwpYzQpTBI8797JwQmZBQ4PaOe2RwyOl8gucYU=)._

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: A problem we need your help with:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hey team -

Coming to you to ask for your help today.

**Here 's the situation:** We've got a major FEC deadline at the end of the month. This deadline marks the end of the first full quarter since Joe Kennedy got in this race.

**Our goal:** We want to generate as many individual donations as possible before the deadline. The number of donations is just as important as how much we raise. Each one sends a powerful message about our grassroots strength.

**Problem:** We're pacing behind where we need to be in order to maintain our strong position in this race. We cannot afford to fall short at this critical moment.

**That 's where you come in.** There's still time to get back on track to hit our fundraising goals, but we need to close the gap quickly. We need as many people as possible to step up right now to chip in whatever they can afford.

**[Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount today to help us reach our goal? Fundraising around the holidays can be difficult. That's why it's so important that we pick up the pace right now.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfc1/693b8b0a/4383ee41/72de7e27/551130918/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191218-full")**

name: Claire Chase
subject: Pelosi Has Never Respected President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Nancy Pelosi has never respected President Trump.
From the moment the election was called, Pelosi and the angry mob of Democrats have made it their mission to remove him from office. Torres Small and Democrats in Congress voted today to take back your vote. They voted to silence your voice. They ignored the will of the American people and wasted millions of our tax dollars to do it.
[Please join me today by contributing $5, $10, $25, $50 or even $100 so we can continue to keep the pressure on the Democrats by letting them know we won't stand for this kind of behavior.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR4j88508NpvJOtPvxQjlLzeUtqznlxj4jmkkqFrKTmUFdlKiSte3k9Hz7gBrj7LfNdD4MHmrRllMGjuTXKcwEDSOhSfOpHUF6ulIfh2MmRcaOx4zdhP6eKyPlwX4nLxuyVy6FLedhw_kmRuHeAGDBeAKHXIGzRLYRuPFQzlFyk4JJ_nxpOZRTuorgRSCmpt&c=ZsPKMEDZYgfssNBW0IaI2VLMP60x8QKTYk-gGVTJiDg_3BQk_7ZS0A==&ch=CVxqaKK3dke4qqdKy-g_uIwwnKDIzBwE6oHQggcgakRIwnlnoJ0Mrw==)

---
| Ignoring the unprecedented achievements President Trump has brought to this country through the greatest economy we've seen in generations, an unemployment rate at a 50 year low, and trade deals that put America's needs first.
None of this matters to them. They have tunnel vision when it comes to this and today they have voted to impeach our President based on second-hand knowledge of events, made-up claims, and the nagging bitterness that Hillary isn't President.
[We need fearless leadership that will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and the liberal elites in Washington DC. We need a true conservative who will fight for President Trump and will represent the will of voters in New Mexico's 2nd Congressional District.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR4j88508NpvJOtPvxQjlLzeUtqznlxj4jmkkqFrKTmUFdlKiSte3k9Hz7gBrj7LfNdD4MHmrRllMGjuTXKcwEDSOhSfOpHUF6ulIfh2MmRcaOx4zdhP6eKyPlwX4nLxuyVy6FLedhw_kmRuHeAGDBeAKHXIGzRLYRuPFQzlFyk4JJ_nxpOZRTuorgRSCmpt&c=ZsPKMEDZYgfssNBW0IaI2VLMP60x8QKTYk-gGVTJiDg_3BQk_7ZS0A==&ch=CVxqaKK3dke4qqdKy-g_uIwwnKDIzBwE6oHQggcgakRIwnlnoJ0Mrw==)
Excited to have you onboard for this fight!

|

name: Charles Booker
subject: A note on impeachment
body:
|
---
Folks, When I was sworn in as a Kentucky state representative, with my hand on my grandma’s Bible, I took an oath to uphold the Constitution of the United States. Serving as a representative and exploring a Senate run are humbling and inspiring privileges, because both represent my commitment to do right by folks like you. **Watching Mitch McConnell disregard his oath to protect Trump at any cost is a disgusting shame, and something Kentuckians cannot afford.** Mitch has determined that justice no longer matters. While our movement fights inequity and injustice, Mitch mocks us by saying that Trump, with his blatant corruption and efforts to pressure Ukraine to interfere in our elections, is above the law. It’s an important step that the House voted in favor of impeachment today. But Mitch has made it clear that he won’t hold a fair Senate trial. He will make sure that Trump is absolved of all wrongdoing and remains in office. **So this movement is going to stand up for the rule of law and retire Mitch in 2020.** _****_**[I promise I will always stand for you — not personal power, corruption, or greed. But my team is still $2,039 away from our goal this week. Will you support this movement to defeat Mitch McConnell by chipping in $10 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13007536/134510737/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191218-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODI3MzQyYi1mZjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJSBCoAeu2UiM6ZuDKahxaVPQ4m9ohEkMjMWjyRAB6k=)**_****_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13007537/134510738/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191218-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODI3MzQyYi1mZjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJSBCoAeu2UiM6ZuDKahxaVPQ4m9ohEkMjMWjyRAB6k=)****

While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, **[will you donate to his exploratory committee?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13007543/134510744/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191218-nd_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODI3MzQyYi1mZjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJSBCoAeu2UiM6ZuDKahxaVPQ4m9ohEkMjMWjyRAB6k=)**

It is a very sad day for America

| Patriot,
It's a very sad day for our country. Despite no evidence of wrongdoing and a completely partisan, unfair process, House Democrats voted to impeach President Trump today. This is all part of their plan to remove the President from office and to smear anyone that champions America-First policies.
---
| | | [>>RAPID DONATE TO DEFEND THE PRESIDENT<<](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vrDO10_Rx6CoGV-3lGW8CjHimEK0EhfBNcjc2kfxqNUxFxzICGtWtBsSq_HTUzpsd12mIm4gBTtFsJ1BCpLy8rITKXpyx-sstco10IuPy-Ci91b6UuM1VGK2R3s2L0T80TsjVZNfUagiLy4ZlhrM0sjPsUJ_6etW8PgH1zYuEWc=&c=q9FGt5-SKwKfgxDBBDdwAF7Dso0jIAkpxsGON0zDIrsyNgS-SnSOng==&ch=jzNIgLCUxeGZTwpO4oI-7UDMAB2Ka4mwd8coHOWZcgoD0XglfVwPUA==)

| The Democrat Party is so terrified that they will lose in 2020 that they had to stoop down to impeachment in order to beat us. They'll pay the price in 2020, but not without your help. Together we can send the do-nothing Democrats home and KEEP AMERICA GREAT in 2020.
---
| | | [FLIP THE HOUSE AND KEEP AMERICA GREAT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vrDO10_Rx6CoGV-3lGW8CjHimEK0EhfBNcjc2kfxqNUxFxzICGtWtBsSq_HTUzpsd12mIm4gBTtFsJ1BCpLy8rITKXpyx-sstco10IuPy-Ci91b6UuM1VGK2R3s2L0T80TsjVZNfUagiLy4ZlhrM0sjPsUJ_6etW8PgH1zYuEWc=&c=q9FGt5-SKwKfgxDBBDdwAF7Dso0jIAkpxsGON0zDIrsyNgS-SnSOng==&ch=jzNIgLCUxeGZTwpO4oI-7UDMAB2Ka4mwd8coHOWZcgoD0XglfVwPUA==)

| We can't let the Democrats continue to destroy our country. They have absolutely no agenda which is why they are fighting dirty to win in 2020. I will stand by the President and fight tooth-and-nail for this country's future, and I hope you'll be there fighting with me.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vrDO10_Rx6CoGV-3lGW8CjHimEK0EhfBNcjc2kfxqNUxFxzICGtWtBsSq_HTUzpsd12mIm4gBTtFsJ1BCpLy8rITKXpyx-sstco10IuPy-Ci91b6UuM1VGK2R3s2L0T80TsjVZNfUagiLy4ZlhrM0sjPsUJ_6etW8PgH1zYuEWc=&c=q9FGt5-SKwKfgxDBBDdwAF7Dso0jIAkpxsGON0zDIrsyNgS-SnSOng==&ch=jzNIgLCUxeGZTwpO4oI-7UDMAB2Ka4mwd8coHOWZcgoD0XglfVwPUA==)

This is all part of their plan to remove the President from office and to smear anyone that champions America-First policies. | | | == | The Democrat Party is so terrified that they will lose in 2020 that they had to stoop down to impeachment in order to beat us. They'll pay the price in 2020, but not without your help. Together we can send the do-nothing Democrats home and KEEP AMERICA GREAT in 2020. | | | == | We can't let the Democrats continue to destroy our country. They have absolutely no agenda which is why they are fighting dirty to win in 2020. I will stand by the President and fight tooth-and-nail for this country's future, and I hope you'll be there fighting with me. | | | == | God bless America & President Trump, | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

name: Dean Browning
subject: Unprecedented Time in American History
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
A few moments ago, we witnessed a tragic, historical event. The House passed the articles of impeachment.
Our Congresswoman, Susan Wild helped Nancy Pelosi achieve this fraud and assault on our democracy.
Rep. Wild just voted to impeach our President, Donald J. Trump.
Please contribute to my campaign today and help me send a message to Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi that they need to stop trying to undo the 2016 election and concentrate on the real issues that are important to the PA-7th Congressional District!
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-bQQKX3qVMB4o6nj-M_ugIYMtVhDwhcQ_k7s9ZJBkh3y3qDBxIR0SR7bQfNFnpiKhEflG87VsJVEhWS48-dBuG4-8uBONKWNXg5khp-lY0hQCmqxaik2jfXOgPee-iI1ergOS9PTGEV8j7sFbCP-shn-gECUklmrziPSmfmy8N-4YztozQAg4A==&c=DNfrGyyN9VfjvtAZ1eN9rPtbE_lrd2rOqhKkjV2z0q4bCyoth-RCig==&ch=b_SyxINoIFamurftkFfhB9fkSJKd6NG1G6bqUy3erQCN6jStWdsVPQ==)
---
| This impeachment represents an unconstitutional abuse of power.
Susan Wild and her fellow Democrats are not interested in advancing President Trump's agenda which has resulted in a robust economy and historic low unemployment numbers for ALL AMERICANS!
Susan Wild and the Democratic party are not interested in working with President Trump to keep America great!
They want to remove him from office and then make America something completely different.
Susan Wild, Nancy Pelosi, and friends are not concerned about the lack of evidence and they don't believe in due process. They are interested in their own political agenda of taking down President Trump at any cost!
The pathway to a Republican majority in the House runs right through the PA-7th Congressional District!
I need your continued support to take the House back in 2020!
We must stop Susan Wild and the Democratic Party. They are putting party over country and the results will be devastating to our great nation.
I can't do this without you. [Please consider giving whatever you can afford to our campaign. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-bQQKX3qVMB4o6nj-M_ugIYMtVhDwhcQ_k7s9ZJBkh3y3qDBxIR0SR7bQfNFnpiKhEflG87VsJVEhWS48-dBuG4-8uBONKWNXg5khp-lY0hQCmqxaik2jfXOgPee-iI1ergOS9PTGEV8j7sFbCP-shn-gECUklmrziPSmfmy8N-4YztozQAg4A==&c=DNfrGyyN9VfjvtAZ1eN9rPtbE_lrd2rOqhKkjV2z0q4bCyoth-RCig==&ch=b_SyxINoIFamurftkFfhB9fkSJKd6NG1G6bqUy3erQCN6jStWdsVPQ==)

body:
Colin Allred has betrayed you
---
| | | | | |
---
|
Peter,
Colin Allred voted to impeach President Trump. Do not forget this vote!
I am deeply saddened by what Colin Allred and his Democrat Socialists have done today, further dividing our nation while wasting taxpayer time and money.
The partisan impeachment proceedings have been an embarrassment. They have presented no new evidence against the president, and they have further divided our country.
He and the rest of the Democrat Socialists are only focused on one person instead of serving 330 million Americans.
Impeachment against President Trump is going nowhere and the Democrats know it. This whole charade is a complete waste of time and we Americans won't forget. Help me hold Colin Allred accountable.

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: [BUMP] Susan Collins is running.
body:
This is a big moment!

Hi -- I wanted to make sure you didn't miss this news:
_Susan Collins just officially launched her reelection campaign._
This is a big moment -- and we need to put up a big response. So what do you say?
**[Welcome Susan Collins to the race by making a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe6/4bef7a87/6a5d80c3/287feb22/149812399/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191218-2-b")**
Let's show Susan Collins what she's up against.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
_\---Original message---_
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe6/4bef7a87/6a5d80c3/287feb21/149812399/VEsE/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")
Friends,
**Susan Collins just officially announced that she is running for reelection.**
Now, we know for sure who our opponent will be. And we know that national Republican donors and special interest groups will be handing over giant checks to fund her reelection efforts. This race is about to heat up fast.
I'm ready, and I know you are too. But how we respond today -- in this moment -- will determine how the rest of this campaign plays out. That's why I have to ask:
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to support our campaign today? Together, we will defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Maine first.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe6/4bef7a87/6a5d80c3/287feb22/149812399/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191218-2-b")**
Control of the Senate is at stake, so Mitch McConnell and big Republican donors will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat for Collins. They'll try to use their money to stop our momentum.
But I know this grassroots team isn't going to let that happen.
Let's do this.
\- _Sara_
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe6/4bef7a87/6a5d80c3/287feb22/149812399/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191218-2-b")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe6/4bef7a87/6a5d80c3/287feb20/149812399/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe6/4bef7a87/6a5d80c3/287feb27/149812399/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Congressman Paul Gosar
subject: I Voted NO!
body:
I was proud to vote NO on the Impeachment of President Trump Fellow Patriot, I write this to you as Nancy Pelosi and her radical comrades in Congress send Articles of Impeachment to the U.S. Senate in a partisan and corrupt effort to overturn the 2016 election. | | | | [](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAABXC2XM00lzhUzFBNrtBZQORgKnVAQAAAIQgpvsLIJ31VJgMlxftoe-V_YKMp3oJPGFg3juuXbg66v69TP_VG3ZNWeE8RY9CSLbQrrbwZXomgAsQqRYclmeBwWADxsB5GeYjPaUVEwjJRLSl6ijwGzDqrjahcFggCrUTqk9znsOAdE7j0G7ClNiymIeuSKUUpATVRVAmqJTPOPEeQMMN1EAoIi2ELD-7g_vOsMYxFam3RnSmJuuYIqhpiEkIfUnTTL-slhG4E6xs5YeMjQaNNKfvDaxlgG1KIsnmsgXXUbnU133OuomJQbepjyuXr4UreTVVkRwTSzd35pkTCDJ7lu-9rilDRj-1hrMaUxXlU-U1--8kaIB-Ot2B1zigKBkYaI3G4NzNwn_EjnhMggx9xGsIOLD1t8ITIA5SVsLLRnug7rN_2LVEGixARu3flSoUsjGLXIjNr-aKCmRt-7A0f2DvaqjvdB67GprPGoEoINopfd_9bJCHW2GRpipJirRlfjOi9qVd9eRok1F3zf1-MdeUJz-zEvnPXjvXTE_ZgscAeJcKYvbAPwm_gOro_Cy5Yfig_Ui_SKMz)

| Fellow Patriot,I write this to you as Nancy Pelosi and her radical comrades in Congress send Articles of Impeachment to the U.S. Senate in a partisan and corrupt effort to overturn the 2016 election.It’s a sad day for our country. It’s a sad day for our Constitution. It’s a sad day for the Rule of Law. Liberal California Congressman Adam Schiff and New York Congressman Jerrold Nadler shamed the House of Representatives with their behavior and embarrassed themselves with exaggerated claims of criminality in the White House. The Impeachment hearings did nothing but expose this for what it is – a coup of President Trump because they know they cannot defeat him at the ballot box. I will not stand silently while progressive activists and social justice warriors collude with labor bosses and radical anti-family groups to impeach our President. Donald Trump has made our country stronger in the world, created record economic growth, hundreds of thousands of new jobs, and is standing up to the radical assault on our traditional American values. I will stand with President Trump as I always have – and ask you to stand with me as you always have. This is a critical time for our country and I urge you to help me in this fight with a [**donation**](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAGqbtLJSNONHJEvWINaNCLHP7kkfAQAAAIQgpvsLIJ31VJgMlxftoe-V_YKMp3oJPGFg3juuXbg66v69TP_VG3ZNWeE8RY9CSLbQrrbwZXomgAsQqRYclmeBwWADxsB5GeYjPaUVEwjJRLSl6ijwGzDqrjahcFggCk4m_DiZQC7LfXZM0ktKobdSpOt186Zfanmb7Uufp0S6j7aQFr0BeBgMf6GkyJGjfWlZ_WO5DMdltDCZqGy4X9rlai0VMXMvRSQpO-R2CVZL6VNMOLnwuk1O7xiajaw7WQKyDu11eMOCogiJCaKNvfNFJ-66JutZt0VAImlq7bI5yZ3K2r2ecJuLTlXknZWxyw) to our 2020 campaign. The election is less than a year away and we are preparing for a fight like this country has never seen. I’m ready. God Bless, Paul PS - if you [**click here**](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAGqbtLJSNONHJEvWINaNCLHP7kkfAQAAAIQgpvsLIJ31VJgMlxftoe-V_YKMp3oJPGFg3juuXbg66v69TP_VG3ZNWeE8RY9CSLbQrrbwZXomgAsQqRYclmeBwWADxsB5GeYjPaUVEwjJRLSl6ijwGzDqrjahcFggCk4m_DiZQC7LfXZM0ktKobdSpOt186Zfanmb7Uufp0S6j7aQFr0BeBgMf6GkyJGjfWlZ_WO5DMdltDCZqGy4X9rlai0VMXMvRSQpO-R2CVZL6VNMOLnwuk1O7xiajaw7WQKyDu11eMOCogiJCaKNvfNFJ-66JutZt0VAImlq7bI5yZ3K2r2ecJuLTlXknZWxyw)**,** you can make a donation of $25, $50, $100, $500, or even $1,000. Every bit helps so give whatever you can afford.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: December 18, 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moulton Leadership Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Moulton for Congress, Seth Moulton for America, Inc
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13007921/134515602/-1369401587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U4ZTc5NC0wMjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7TVEqJ7Q5HXSdXPfZW3Ns56JzA1fNpPqNjBMQ72QRI=&emci=fb6acae7-f321-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=73e8e794-0222-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=194769) Friend, Today marks only the third time since our country’s founding that a sitting president has been impeached by the House of Representatives. No president in history has done so much damage to our institutions, to our Constitution, or to our values. When our Founders expressed their fear of foreign interference in our elections, even they must never have imagined that a U.S. president would solicit and sanction it. And all our past presidents, even those under impeachment inquiries themselves, ultimately respected the Constitutional responsibilities of Congress; by obstructing testimony from members of his Administration, President Trump has flagrantly violated them. I swore an oath, as a United States Marine and as a Member of Congress, to protect and defend the Constitution unconditionally. Today, that oath compelled me to vote to impeach President Donald Trump. The standards to which we hold the president today set the precedent for future presidents and future generations. History will judge whether, in this time of great division, our leaders put our country first and upheld the American principles of our government: that all are created equal, that no one is above the law, and that we are all responsible for building a freer and more perfect union. This is not a happy day for our country, and it should remind us that the consequences of coming up short in the 2016 election have been severe—for our country, for our Constitution, and for our future. Admiring the leadership of the national security Democrats who signed the pivotal impeachment op-ed in the _Washington Post_ , we must address this moment, and then look to 2020 and beyond. We have to put in the work now so that we win the future. We have to do everything we can to get our country back on track, to rebuild the institutions Trump has attacked, and to ensure that only men and women of the highest character become our elected leaders. Thank you, Seth [**P.S. Rush a contribution today to our More Perfect Union fund, which we will use to help elect Democrats who are proven leaders across the country in 2020.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13007922/134515603/-818726472?refcode=20191218_SM_impeachment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U4ZTc5NC0wMjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7TVEqJ7Q5HXSdXPfZW3Ns56JzA1fNpPqNjBMQ72QRI=)

name: Susan Collins
subject: Become a Founding Member

body:
I'm excited to finally announce.... I'm running for re-election!
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDEzNjkyMTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcxNjc3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEzNjkyMTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcxNjc3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_

Peter,

I'm excited to finally announce.... I'm running for re-election!

I did not make this decision lightly. I have spent the last year, working hard for the people of Maine while also watching our political system spiral out of control.

I know that now more than ever, our nation needs a common-sense voice in Washington. I am proud to be someone who votes based off of what is right -- not because of what I'm told.

And that's why I am running for re-election.

But, Peter, this isn't going to be easy. In fact, it's going to be the toughest campaign I've ever faced. That's why I need your help to ensure I'm able to win next November.

I hope you'll stand with me by becoming a Day ONE donor to my team right now!
[**Yes, Susan! I 'll stand with you!
BECOME A DAY ONE DONOR >>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEzNjkyMTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcxNjc3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I have never before announced a campaign in an odd numbered year, but I know that times right now are different than they've ever been before. The far left has been attacking me personally and trying to mislead voters about my record with endless dark-money negative ads and mailings. Until very recently, I have tried to ignore these attacks, but rule one of politics is that lies stated often enough are eventually believed.

So, Peter, it's time for me to fight back.

[**Your donation today**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDEzNjkyMTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcxNjc3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) will not only let me know that I can count on you, but it will help me fight back against the millions that will be poured into Maine to defeat and slander me.
[**Yes, Susan! I 'll stand with you!
BECOME A DAY ONE DONOR >>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDEzNjkyMTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTcxNjc3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We've got a long road ahead of us, but every journey begins with a first step. I hope you will take this first step with me!

Sincerely,
Susan Collins

Until very recently, I have tried to ignore these attacks, but rule one of politics is that lies stated often enough are eventually believed. So, Peter, it's time for me to fight back. will not only let me know that I can count on you, but it will help me fight back against the millions that will be poured into Maine to defeat and slander me. We've got a long road ahead of us, but every journey begins with a first step. I hope you will take this first step with me! Sincerely, Susan Collins Paid for by Collins for Senator Click to unsubscribe from Collins for Senator.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Peter --

**Earlier today, my opponent -- House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy -- cast his vote AGAINST impeaching President Trump.**

And now, Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans are gearing up to let Trump get away with his crimes and obstruction _completely_.

Frankly, I’m _outraged_ by this, Peter. And I know you are, too.

clean_body: I'm outraged. I know you are, too. | = Peter -- Earlier today, my opponent -- House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy -- cast his vote AGAINST impeaching President Trump. And now, Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans are gearing up to let Trump get away with his crimes and obstruction completely. Frankly, I’m outraged by this, Peter. And I know you are, too. = | = = = Last night, Trump threw a temper tantrum on paper, and sent Nancy Pelosi a raging, conspiracy ridden, SIX PAGE letter that insulted her and the brave members of Congress who are voting to impeach him. It proves that Trump is going to lie through every step of this process to keep his power. We’re better than that. Our country is stronger than that. You and I KNOW that. Impeachment is NOT about partisan scorekeeping -- this is about showing Americans that no one, not even the president, is above the law. That’s why I’m running for Congress to end Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy’s career. He’s one of Trump’s biggest defenders in the House -- so much so, that Trump even has a nickname for him: "MY Kevin." Look, I’ll be honest: I won’t be able to win without your help. McCarthy is being bankrolled by special interests. But Peter, I did not grow up wealthy. I was a single working mom to my only daughter, Kathryn. I am a proud United States Air Force veteran. **Seven days a week** , my dad does what millions of people do all across the country: He gets out of bed, puts on a tartan tie, and gets ready to tackle the day. But he does something unique, too — he draws a symbol on the back of his hand before hitting the campaign trail.

Have you noticed it, friend? The symbol looks like a tic-tac-toe board, but it’s actually called a Jerusalem Cross. It might look strange, but to me that cross on his hand is just as much a part of my dad as his tartan tie. My dad draws the Jerusalem Cross on his hand to remind himself of two things: his faith, and his commitment to tell the truth, no matter the cost. Whether he’s at a coffee shop in New Hampshire with a handful of local voters or at the Democratic debate tomorrow in front of millions of Americans — I know he’ll always tell the truth. Part of that truth-telling is that when my dad sees something wrong, he speaks out about it. Today, he sees that so many of America’s big problems, from our climate crisis to our broken health care system, share the same root cause — a political system that has allowed corporations to buy power and put their profits ahead of people’s rights. As he fights for a government of, by, and for the people, he’s got a moral compass on his hand. That’s who my dad is. My parents inspired me to be the person that I am today. I’m drawing a cross on my hand tomorrow, not just to support the man in the tartan tie, but as a reminder for me to live up to an ideal he taught me — to tell the truth, always. Thanks,
Sam Steyer
---

clean_body: | | | | Seven days a week , my dad does what millions of people do all across the country: He gets out of bed, puts on a tartan tie, and gets ready to tackle the day. But he does something unique, too — he draws a symbol on the back of his hand before hitting the campaign trail. Have you noticed it, friend? The symbol looks like a tic-tac-toe board, but it’s actually called a Jerusalem Cross. It might look strange, but to me that cross on his hand is just as much a part of my dad as his tartan tie. My dad draws the Jerusalem Cross on his hand to remind himself of two things: his faith, and his commitment to tell the truth, no matter the cost. Whether he’s at a coffee shop in New Hampshire with a handful of local voters or at the Democratic debate tomorrow in front of millions of Americans — I know he’ll always tell the truth. Part of that truth-telling is that when my dad sees something wrong, he speaks out about it. Today, he sees that so many of America’s big problems, from our climate crisis to our broken health care system, share the same root cause — a political system that has allowed corporations to buy power and put their profits ahead of people’s rights. As he fights for a government of, by, and for the people, he’s got a moral compass on his hand. That’s who my dad is. My parents inspired me to be the person that I am today. I’m drawing a cross on my hand tomorrow, not just to support the man in the tartan tie, but as a reminder for me to live up to an ideal he taught me — to tell the truth, always.
